USERMESSAGE #46
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Main Simulation Engine
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Manages the game clock and drives the object engine + characters.
     6→// Ticks at configurable intervals (~5 seconds default).
     7→// Provides start/stop/pause controls and an event bus.
     8→
     9→import { ObjectEngine } from './objects.js';
    10→import { OBJECT_DEFS, SECTORS, WORLD_TREE } from './world.js';
    11→import { Character, CHARACTER_DEFS, isWalkable } from './characters.js';
    12→import { MAP_COLS } from './tilemap.js';
    13→
    14→export class SimulationEngine {
    15→  constructor(options = {}) {
    16→    this.tickIntervalMs = options.tickIntervalMs ?? 5000; // ~5 seconds
    17→    this.timeScale = options.timeScale ?? 1;              // speed multiplier
    18→
    19→    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();
    20→    this.running = false;
    21→    this.paused = false;
    22→    this.elapsedMs = 0;         // total simulation time
    23→    this.tickCount = 0;
    24→    this.listeners = new Map();  // event type → Set<callback>
    25→
    26→    this._rafId = null;
    27→    this._lastTimestamp = null;
    28→    this._accumulator = 0;       // accumulated time toward next tick
    29→
    30→    // Load world
    31→    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);
    32→    this.sectors = SECTORS;
    33→    this.worldTree = WORLD_TREE;
    34→
    35→    // Load characters
    36→    this.characters = CHARACTER_DEFS.map(def => new Character(def));
    37→
    38→    // AI integration
    39→    this.aiEngine = options.aiEngine || null;
    40→    this.aiMode = false;
    41→
    42→    // Simulated clock — starts at 8:00 AM on Day 1
    43→    // Each tick advances 5 sim-minutes → 1 sim-day per ~24 real minutes at 1x
    44→    this.simClock = {
    45→      day: 1,
    46→      minuteOfDay: 480,
    47→      simMinutesPerTick: 5,
    48→      get hour() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay / 60); },
    49→      get minute() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay % 60); },
    50→      get timeString() {
    51→        const h = this.hour;
    52→        const m = this.minute;
    53→        const period = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
    54→        const h12 = h % 12 || 12;
    55→        return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${period}`;
    56→      },
    57→      get dayTimeString() {
    58→        return `Day ${this.day} \u2014 ${this.timeString}`;
    59→      },
    60→      advance() {
    61→        this.minuteOfDay += this.simMinutesPerTick;
    62→        while (this.minuteOfDay >= 1440) {
    63→          this.minuteOfDay -= 1440;
    64→          this.day++;
    65→        }
    66→      },
    67→    };
    68→
    69→    // Last notable event for the status bar
    70→    this.lastStatusText = '';
    71→
    72→    // Forward object events to our bus
    73→    this.objectEngine.onTransition((event) => {
    74→      this._emit('object:transition', event);
    75→      this._reactToObjectEvent(event);
    76→    });
    77→
    78→    // Attach AI engine
    79→    if (this.aiEngine) {
    80→      this.aiEngine.attach(this);
    81→    }
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  start() {
    85→    if (this.running) return;
    86→    this.running = true;
    87→    this.paused = false;
    88→    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();
    89→    this._accumulator = 0;
    90→    this._emit('engine:start', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
    91→    this._loop();
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  stop() {
    95→    this.running = false;
    96→    this.paused = false;
    97→    if (this._rafId) {
    98→      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);
    99→      this._rafId = null;
   100→    }
   101→    this._emit('engine:stop', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs, tickCount: this.tickCount });
   102→  }
   103→
   104→  pause() {
   105→    if (!this.running) return;
   106→    this.paused = true;
   107→    this._emit('engine:pause', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
   108→  }
   109→
   110→  resume() {
   111→    if (!this.running || !this.paused) return;
   112→    this.paused = false;
   113→    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();
   114→    this._emit('engine:resume', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
   115→  }
   116→
   117→  // Manually advance by a number of ticks (useful for testing)
   118→  manualTick(count = 1) {
   119→    const events = [];
   120→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   121→      const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);
   122→      this.tickCount++;
   123→      this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;
   124→      this._wanderTick();
   125→      this._updateCharacters(this.tickIntervalMs);
   126→      events.push(...tickEvents);
   127→    }
   128→    this._emit('engine:tick', {
   129→      tickCount: this.tickCount,
   130→      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   131→      events,
   132→    });
   133→    return events;
   134→  }
   135→
   136→  // Interact with an object (character-triggered)
   137→  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {
   138→    return this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);
   139→  }
   140→
   141→  // Get object by id
   142→  getObject(objectId) {
   143→    return this.objectEngine.get(objectId);
   144→  }
   145→
   146→  // Get all objects
   147→  getAllObjects() {
   148→    return this.objectEngine.getAll();
   149→  }
   150→
   151→  // Get objects in a sector
   152→  getObjectsInSector(sector) {
   153→    return this.objectEngine.getBySector(sector);
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  // Get all characters
   157→  getCharacters() {
   158→    return this.characters;
   159→  }
   160→
   161→  // Full state snapshot
   162→  snapshot() {
   163→    return {
   164→      running: this.running,
   165→      paused: this.paused,
   166→      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   167→      tickCount: this.tickCount,
   168→      tickIntervalMs: this.tickIntervalMs,
   169→      timeScale: this.timeScale,
   170→      aiMode: this.aiMode,
   171→      simClock: { day: this.simClock.day, time: this.simClock.timeString },
   172→      objects: this.objectEngine.snapshot(),
   173→      characters: this.characters.map(c => ({
   174→        id: c.id, name: c.name, tx: c.tx, ty: c.ty,
   175→        action: c.action, facing: c.facing, mood: c.mood,
   176→        targetObjectId: c.targetObjectId,
   177→      })),
   178→    };
   179→  }
   180→
   181→  // ── Event bus ──
   182→
   183→  on(eventType, callback) {
   184→    if (!this.listeners.has(eventType)) {
   185→      this.listeners.set(eventType, new Set());
   186→    }
   187→    this.listeners.get(eventType).add(callback);
   188→    return () => this.off(eventType, callback);
   189→  }
   190→
   191→  off(eventType, callback) {
   192→    this.listeners.get(eventType)?.delete(callback);
   193→  }
   194→
   195→  _emit(eventType, data) {
   196→    const callbacks = this.listeners.get(eventType);
   197→    if (callbacks) {
   198→      for (const cb of callbacks) {
   199→        cb(data);
   200→      }
   201→    }
   202→    // Also emit wildcard
   203→    const wildcards = this.listeners.get('*');
   204→    if (wildcards) {
   205→      for (const cb of wildcards) {
   206→        cb({ type: eventType, ...data });
   207→      }
   208→    }
   209→  }
   210→
   211→  // ── Character AI / Wander behavior ──
   212→
   213→  _wanderTick() {
   214→    // Advance simulated clock each tick
   215→    this.simClock.advance();
   216→
   217→    for (const char of this.characters) {
   218→      if (char.action !== 'idle') continue;
   219→
   220→      // AI mode: delegate to AI decision engine
   221→      if (this.aiMode && this.aiEngine) {
   222→        if (!this.aiEngine.isPending(char.id)) {
   223→          this.aiEngine.tick(char, this.tickIntervalMs);
   224→        }
   225→        continue;
   226→      }
   227→
   228→      // Random wander with cooldown
   229→      char.wanderCooldown -= this.tickIntervalMs;
   230→      if (char.wanderCooldown > 0) continue;
   231→
   232→      // Priority actions first (reactive behavior), then random wander
   233→      const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);
   234→      const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);
   235→      const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';
   236→
   237→      if (!target) {
   238→        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;
   239→        continue;
   240→      }
   241→
   242→      const tile = this._findFreeInteractTile(target.position, char);
   243→      if (!tile) {
   244→        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;
   245→        continue;
   246→      }
   247→
   248→      // Already adjacent — interact directly
   249→      const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);
   250→      if (atTarget) {
   251→        this._doInteraction(char, target, action);
   252→        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;
   253→      } else if (this._moveCharWithCollision(char, tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   254→        char.targetObjectId = target.id;
   255→        char.pendingAction = action;
   256→        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;
   257→      } else {
   258→        // Path blocked by another character — schedule retry
   259→        char._pendingTarget = { obj: target, action, tile };
   260→        char._retryCount = 1;
   261→        char._retryTimer = 500 + Math.random() * 500;
   262→        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;
   263→      }
   264→    }
   265→  }
   266→
   267→  /** Immediate random wander (no cooldown) — used as AI fallback. */
   268→  _randomWander(char) {
   269→    const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);
   270→    const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);
   271→    const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';
   272→
   273→    if (!target) return;
   274→
   275→    const tile = this._findFreeInteractTile(target.position, char);
   276→    if (!tile) return;
   277→
   278→    const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);
   279→    if (atTarget) {
   280→      this._doInteraction(char, target, action);
   281→    } else if (this._moveCharWithCollision(char, tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   282→      char.targetObjectId = target.id;
   283→      char.pendingAction = action;
   284→    }
   285→    // If path blocked, AI will retry naturally on next call
   286→  }
   287→
   288→  _updateCharacters(deltaMs) {
   289→    for (const char of this.characters) {
   290→      const wasWalking = char.action === 'walking';
   291→      char.update(deltaMs);
   292→
   293→      // Character just arrived at destination
   294→      if (wasWalking && char.action === 'idle') {
   295→        if (char.targetObjectId) {
   296→          const obj = this.objectEngine.get(char.targetObjectId);
   297→          if (obj) {
   298→            this._doInteraction(char, obj, char.pendingAction || 'use');
   299→          } else {
   300→            char.targetObjectId = null;
   301→          }
   302→          char.pendingAction = 'use';
   303→        } else if (char.targetCharId) {
   304→          // Character arrived near another character for conversation — face each other
   305→          const target = this.characters.find(c => c.id === char.targetCharId);
   306→          if (target) {
   307→            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);
   308→            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);
   309→          }
   310→          char.targetCharId = null;
   311→        } else if (char._pendingTarget) {
   312→          // Arrived at deadlock-escape tile — try to re-path to the original goal
   313→          const { obj, action, tile } = char._pendingTarget;
   314→          const atTarget = tile.tx === char.tx && tile.ty === char.ty;
   315→          if (atTarget) {
   316→            this._doInteraction(char, obj, action);
   317→            char._pendingTarget = null;
   318→            char._retryCount = 0;
   319→          } else if (this._moveCharWithCollision(char, tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   320→            char.targetObjectId = obj.id;
   321→            char.pendingAction = action;
   322→            char._pendingTarget = null;
   323→            char._retryCount = 0;
   324→          } else {
   325→            // Still blocked after escape — give up
   326→            char._pendingTarget = null;
   327→            char._retryCount = 0;
   328→          }
   329→        }
   330→      }
   331→
   332→      // Retry timer: character is idle, waiting to re-path to a blocked goal
   333→      if (char.action === 'idle' && char._retryTimer > 0) {
   334→        char._retryTimer -= deltaMs;
   335→        if (char._retryTimer <= 0) {
   336→          char._retryTimer = 0;
   337→          if (char._pendingTarget) {
   338→            const { obj, action, tile } = char._pendingTarget;
   339→            if (this._moveCharWithCollision(char, tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   340→              // Path found — proceed normally
   341→              char.targetObjectId = obj.id;
   342→              char.pendingAction = action;
   343→              char._pendingTarget = null;
   344→              char._retryCount = 0;
   345→            } else if (char._retryCount < 3) {
   346→              // Still blocked — wait and try again
   347→              char._retryCount++;
   348→              char._retryTimer = 500 + Math.random() * 500;
   349→            } else {
   350→              // 3 failures — escape to an adjacent free tile and re-path from there
   351→              char._retryCount = 0;
   352→              this._deadlockEscape(char);
   353→            }
   354→          }
   355→        }
   356→      }
   357→    }
   358→  }
   359→
   360→  // ── Object → interaction animation mapping ──
   361→  // Maps object ID substrings to the animation played during interaction.
   362→  static _getInteractAnim(objectId) {
   363→    if (!objectId) return null;
   364→    if (objectId.includes('book') || objectId.includes('desk') || objectId.includes('bookshelf')) {
   365→      return 'reading';
   366→    }
   367→    if (objectId.includes('bed') || objectId.includes('kotatsu') || objectId.includes('sofa') || objectId.includes('tv')) {
   368→      return 'sit';
   369→    }
   370→    // phone / general interaction fallback for everything else
   371→    return 'phone';
   372→  }
   373→
   374→  _doInteraction(char, obj, action = 'use') {
   375→    // Face toward the object
   376→    const objCx = obj.position.tx + (obj.position.tw || 1) / 2;
   377→    const objCy = obj.position.ty + (obj.position.th || 1) / 2;
   378→    const dx = objCx - char.tx;
   379→    const dy = objCy - char.ty;
   380→    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {
   381→      char._updateFacing(dx, 0);
   382→    } else {
   383→      char._updateFacing(0, dy);
   384→    }
   385→
   386→    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(obj.id, action);
   387→    if (event) {
   388→      const anim = SimulationEngine._getInteractAnim(obj.id);
   389→      char.startInteraction(obj.id, anim);
   390→
   391→      // Successful interaction → happy (unless already upset)
   392→      if (char.mood !== 'upset') {
   393→        char.setMood('happy', 5000);
   394→      }
   395→
   396→      this._emit('character:interact', {
   397→        characterId: char.id, characterName: char.name,
   398→        objectId: obj.id, objectName: event.objectName,
   399→        from: event.from, to: event.to,
   400→        produces: event.produces || null,
   401→        emoji: event.emoji || null,
   402→      });
   403→    } else {
   404→      char.targetObjectId = null;
   405→    }
   406→  }
   407→
   408→  // ── Collision helpers ──
   409→
   410→  /** Returns a Set of tile keys (ty*MAP_COLS+tx) for all characters except `exceptChar`. */
   411→  _getOccupiedTiles(exceptChar) {
   412→    const tiles = new Set();
   413→    for (const c of this.characters) {
   414→      if (c === exceptChar) continue;
   415→      tiles.add(c.ty * MAP_COLS + c.tx);
   416→    }
   417→    return tiles;
   418→  }
   419→
   420→  /** Like char.moveTo but marks other characters' tiles as unwalkable during A*. */
   421→  _moveCharWithCollision(char, goalTx, goalTy) {
   422→    const blocked = this._getOccupiedTiles(char);
   423→    return char.moveTo(goalTx, goalTy, blocked);
   424→  }
   425→
   426→  /** Like findInteractTile but prefers tiles not currently occupied by other characters. */
   427→  _findFreeInteractTile(objPosition, char) {
   428→    const { tx, ty, tw = 1, th = 1 } = objPosition;
   429→    const occupied = this._getOccupiedTiles(char);
   430→    const free = [];
   431→    const all = [];
   432→
   433→    const addCandidate = (x, y) => {
   434→      if (!isWalkable(x, y)) return;
   435→      const entry = { tx: x, ty: y };
   436→      all.push(entry);
   437→      if (!occupied.has(y * MAP_COLS + x)) free.push(entry);
   438→    };
   439→
   440→    for (let x = tx - 1; x <= tx + tw; x++) {
   441→      addCandidate(x, ty - 1);
   442→      addCandidate(x, ty + th);
   443→    }
   444→    for (let y = ty; y < ty + th; y++) {
   445→      addCandidate(tx - 1, y);
   446→      addCandidate(tx + tw, y);
   447→    }
   448→
   449→    const pool = free.length > 0 ? free : all;
   450→    if (pool.length === 0) return null;
   451→    return pool[Math.floor(Math.random() * pool.length)];
   452→  }
   453→
   454→  /**
   455→   * Deadlock escape: move to a random free adjacent tile so the character
   456→   * can re-path around whatever is blocking them. _pendingTarget is preserved
   457→   * so the arrival handler knows to re-path to the original goal.
   458→   */
   459→  _deadlockEscape(char) {
   460→    const DIRS = [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]];
   461→    const occupied = this._getOccupiedTiles(char);
   462→    // Shuffle directions for variety
   463→    const dirs = DIRS.slice().sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
   464→    for (const [dx, dy] of dirs) {
   465→      const nx = char.tx + dx;
   466→      const ny = char.ty + dy;
   467→      if (isWalkable(nx, ny) && !occupied.has(ny * MAP_COLS + nx)) {
   468→        // Move one tile — _pendingTarget stays set; arrival handler will re-path
   469→        char.moveTo(nx, ny);
   470→        return;
   471→      }
   472→    }
   473→    // Completely surrounded — give up
   474→    char._pendingTarget = null;
   475→    char._retryCount = 0;
   476→  }
   477→
   478→  _getPriorityTarget(char) {
   479→    // Sol: pick up book if closed and nearby
   480→    if (char.id === 'sol') {
   481→      const book = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_book');
   482→      if (book && book.state === 'closed') {
   483→        const dist = Math.abs(book.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(book.position.ty - char.ty);
   484→        if (dist <= 6) {
   485→          return { obj: book, action: 'use' };
   486→        }
   487→      }
   488→    }
   489→
   490→    // Non-Maple near stocked display → take pastry
   491→    if (char.id !== 'maple') {
   492→      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   493→      if (display && display.state === 'stocked') {
   494→        const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);
   495→        if (dist <= 8) {
   496→          return { obj: display, action: 'use' };
   497→        }
   498→      }
   499→    }
   500→
   501→    // Maple: restock empty display case
   502→    if (char.id === 'maple') {
   503→      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   504→      if (display && display.state === 'empty') {
   505→        return { obj: display, action: 'use' };
   506→      }
   507→    }
   508→
   509→    return null;
   510→  }
   511→
   512→  _pickWanderTarget(char) {
   513→    const allObjects = this.objectEngine.getAll();
   514→
   515→    // 60% home sector, 40% any sector
   516→    let candidates;
   517→    if (Math.random() < 0.6) {
   518→      candidates = allObjects.filter(o => o.sector === char.homeSector);
   519→      if (candidates.length === 0) candidates = allObjects;
   520→    } else {
   521→      candidates = allObjects;
   522→    }
   523→
   524→    // Avoid repeating last interaction
   525→    if (char.lastObjectId && candidates.length > 1) {
   526→      candidates = candidates.filter(o => o.id !== char.lastObjectId);
   527→    }
   528→
   529→    if (candidates.length === 0) return null;
   530→    return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
   531→  }
   532→
   533→  _reactToObjectEvent(event) {
   534→    // Espresso done → Maple happy
   535→    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_espresso' && event.to === 'done') {
   536→      const maple = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'maple');
   537→      if (maple) maple.setMood('happy', 10000);
   538→    }
   539→
   540→    // Easel finished → Nyx happy
   541→    if (event.objectId === 'apt_easel' && event.to === 'finished') {
   542→      const nyx = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'nyx');
   543→      if (nyx) nyx.setMood('happy', 20000);
   544→    }
   545→
   546→    // Display restocked → nearby characters happy
   547→    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_display' && event.to === 'stocked') {
   548→      for (const char of this.characters) {
   549→        const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   550→        if (display) {
   551→          const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);
   552→          if (dist <= 6) char.setMood('happy', 10000);
   553→        }
   554→      }
   555→    }
   556→  }
   557→
   558→  // ── Internal loop ──
   559→
   560→  _loop() {
   561→    if (!this.running) return;
   562→
   563→    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame((timestamp) => {
   564→      if (!this.running) return;
   565→
   566→      if (!this.paused) {
   567→        const rawDelta = timestamp - this._lastTimestamp;
   568→        const delta = Math.min(rawDelta, 500) * this.timeScale; // cap delta, apply scale
   569→
   570→        this._accumulator += delta;
   571→
   572→        // Process full ticks
   573→        while (this._accumulator >= this.tickIntervalMs) {
   574→          this._accumulator -= this.tickIntervalMs;
   575→          const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);
   576→          this.tickCount++;
   577→          this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;
   578→
   579→          this._wanderTick();
   580→
   581→          this._emit('engine:tick', {
   582→            tickCount: this.tickCount,
   583→            elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   584→            events: tickEvents,
   585→          });
   586→        }
   587→
   588→        // Smooth character movement each frame
   589→        this._updateCharacters(delta);
   590→      }
   591→
   592→      this._lastTimestamp = timestamp;
   593→      this._loop();
   594→    });
   595→  }
   596→}
   597→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_01KCi8EfTPb87vMBU2CmkaCL",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     2\u2192// Main Simulation Engine\n     3\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Manages the game clock and drives the object engine + characters.\n     6\u2192// Ticks at configurable intervals (~5 seconds default).\n     7\u2192// Provides start/stop/pause controls and an event bus.\n     8\u2192\n     9\u2192import { ObjectEngine } from './objects.js';\n    10\u2192import { OBJECT_DEFS, SECTORS, WORLD_TREE } from './world.js';\n    11\u2192import { Character, CHARACTER_DEFS, isWalkable } from './characters.js';\n    12\u2192import { MAP_COLS } from './tilemap.js';\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192export class SimulationEngine {\n    15\u2192  constructor(options = {}) {\n    16\u2192    this.tickIntervalMs = options.tickIntervalMs ?? 5000; // ~5 seconds\n    17\u2192    this.timeScale = options.timeScale ?? 1;              // speed multiplier\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();\n    20\u2192    this.running = false;\n    21\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    22\u2192    this.elapsedMs = 0;         // total simulation time\n    23\u2192    this.tickCount = 0;\n    24\u2192    this.listeners = new Map();  // event type \u2192 Set<callback>\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192    this._rafId = null;\n    27\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = null;\n    28\u2192    this._accumulator = 0;       // accumulated time toward next tick\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192    // Load world\n    31\u2192    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);\n    32\u2192    this.sectors = SECTORS;\n    33\u2192    this.worldTree = WORLD_TREE;\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192    // Load characters\n    36\u2192    this.characters = CHARACTER_DEFS.map(def => new Character(def));\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192    // AI integration\n    39\u2192    this.aiEngine = options.aiEngine || null;\n    40\u2192    this.aiMode = false;\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192    // Simulated clock \u2014 starts at 8:00 AM on Day 1\n    43\u2192    // Each tick advances 5 sim-minutes \u2192 1 sim-day per ~24 real minutes at 1x\n    44\u2192    this.simClock = {\n    45\u2192      day: 1,\n    46\u2192      minuteOfDay: 480,\n    47\u2192      simMinutesPerTick: 5,\n    48\u2192      get hour() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay / 60); },\n    49\u2192      get minute() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay % 60); },\n    50\u2192      get timeString() {\n    51\u2192        const h = this.hour;\n    52\u2192        const m = this.minute;\n    53\u2192        const period = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';\n    54\u2192        const h12 = h % 12 || 12;\n    55\u2192        return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${period}`;\n    56\u2192      },\n    57\u2192      get dayTimeString() {\n    58\u2192        return `Day ${this.day} \\u2014 ${this.timeString}`;\n    59\u2192      },\n    60\u2192      advance() {\n    61\u2192        this.minuteOfDay += this.simMinutesPerTick;\n    62\u2192        while (this.minuteOfDay >= 1440) {\n    63\u2192          this.minuteOfDay -= 1440;\n    64\u2192          this.day++;\n    65\u2192        }\n    66\u2192      },\n    67\u2192    };\n    68\u2192\n    69\u2192    // Last notable event for the status bar\n    70\u2192    this.lastStatusText = '';\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192    // Forward object events to our bus\n    73\u2192    this.objectEngine.onTransition((event) => {\n    74\u2192      this._emit('object:transition', event);\n    75\u2192      this._reactToObjectEvent(event);\n    76\u2192    });\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192    // Attach AI engine\n    79\u2192    if (this.aiEngine) {\n    80\u2192      this.aiEngine.attach(this);\n    81\u2192    }\n    82\u2192  }\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192  start() {\n    85\u2192    if (this.running) return;\n    86\u2192    this.running = true;\n    87\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    88\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();\n    89\u2192    this._accumulator = 0;\n    90\u2192    this._emit('engine:start', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n    91\u2192    this._loop();\n    92\u2192  }\n    93\u2192\n    94\u2192  stop() {\n    95\u2192    this.running = false;\n    96\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    97\u2192    if (this._rafId) {\n    98\u2192      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);\n    99\u2192      this._rafId = null;\n   100\u2192    }\n   101\u2192    this._emit('engine:stop', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs, tickCount: this.tickCount });\n   102\u2192  }\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192  pause() {\n   105\u2192    if (!this.running) return;\n   106\u2192    this.paused = true;\n   107\u2192    this._emit('engine:pause', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n   108\u2192  }\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192  resume() {\n   111\u2192    if (!this.running || !this.paused) return;\n   112\u2192    this.paused = false;\n   113\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();\n   114\u2192    this._emit('engine:resume', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n   115\u2192  }\n   116\u2192\n   117\u2192  // Manually advance by a number of ticks (useful for testing)\n   118\u2192  manualTick(count = 1) {\n   119\u2192    const events = [];\n   120\u2192    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n   121\u2192      const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   122\u2192      this.tickCount++;\n   123\u2192      this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;\n   124\u2192      this._wanderTick();\n   125\u2192      this._updateCharacters(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   126\u2192      events.push(...tickEvents);\n   127\u2192    }\n   128\u2192    this._emit('engine:tick', {\n   129\u2192      tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   130\u2192      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   131\u2192      events,\n   132\u2192    });\n   133\u2192    return events;\n   134\u2192  }\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192  // Interact with an object (character-triggered)\n   137\u2192  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {\n   138\u2192    return this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);\n   139\u2192  }\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192  // Get object by id\n   142\u2192  getObject(objectId) {\n   143\u2192    return this.objectEngine.get(objectId);\n   144\u2192  }\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192  // Get all objects\n   147\u2192  getAllObjects() {\n   148\u2192    return this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   149\u2192  }\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192  // Get objects in a sector\n   152\u2192  getObjectsInSector(sector) {\n   153\u2192    return this.objectEngine.getBySector(sector);\n   154\u2192  }\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192  // Get all characters\n   157\u2192  getCharacters() {\n   158\u2192    return this.characters;\n   159\u2192  }\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192  // Full state snapshot\n   162\u2192  snapshot() {\n   163\u2192    return {\n   164\u2192      running: this.running,\n   165\u2192      paused: this.paused,\n   166\u2192      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   167\u2192      tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   168\u2192      tickIntervalMs: this.tickIntervalMs,\n   169\u2192      timeScale: this.timeScale,\n   170\u2192      aiMode: this.aiMode,\n   171\u2192      simClock: { day: this.simClock.day, time: this.simClock.timeString },\n   172\u2192      objects: this.objectEngine.snapshot(),\n   173\u2192      characters: this.characters.map(c => ({\n   174\u2192        id: c.id, name: c.name, tx: c.tx, ty: c.ty,\n   175\u2192        action: c.action, facing: c.facing, mood: c.mood,\n   176\u2192        targetObjectId: c.targetObjectId,\n   177\u2192      })),\n   178\u2192    };\n   179\u2192  }\n   180\u2192\n   181\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Event bus \u2500\u2500\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192  on(eventType, callback) {\n   184\u2192    if (!this.listeners.has(eventType)) {\n   185\u2192      this.listeners.set(eventType, new Set());\n   186\u2192    }\n   187\u2192    this.listeners.get(eventType).add(callback);\n   188\u2192    return () => this.off(eventType, callback);\n   189\u2192  }\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192  off(eventType, callback) {\n   192\u2192    this.listeners.get(eventType)?.delete(callback);\n   193\u2192  }\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192  _emit(eventType, data) {\n   196\u2192    const callbacks = this.listeners.get(eventType);\n   197\u2192    if (callbacks) {\n   198\u2192      for (const cb of callbacks) {\n   199\u2192        cb(data);\n   200\u2192      }\n   201\u2192    }\n   202\u2192    // Also emit wildcard\n   203\u2192    const wildcards = this.listeners.get('*');\n   204\u2192    if (wildcards) {\n   205\u2192      for (const cb of wildcards) {\n   206\u2192        cb({ type: eventType, ...data });\n   207\u2192      }\n   208\u2192    }\n   209\u2192  }\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Character AI / Wander behavior \u2500\u2500\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192  _wanderTick() {\n   214\u2192    // Advance simulated clock each tick\n   215\u2192    this.simClock.advance();\n   216\u2192\n   217\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   218\u2192      if (char.action !== 'idle') continue;\n   219\u2192\n   220\u2192      // AI mode: delegate to AI decision engine\n   221\u2192      if (this.aiMode && this.aiEngine) {\n   222\u2192        if (!this.aiEngine.isPending(char.id)) {\n   223\u2192          this.aiEngine.tick(char, this.tickIntervalMs);\n   224\u2192        }\n   225\u2192        continue;\n   226\u2192      }\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192      // Random wander with cooldown\n   229\u2192      char.wanderCooldown -= this.tickIntervalMs;\n   230\u2192      if (char.wanderCooldown > 0) continue;\n   231\u2192\n   232\u2192      // Priority actions first (reactive behavior), then random wander\n   233\u2192      const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);\n   234\u2192      const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);\n   235\u2192      const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192      if (!target) {\n   238\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   239\u2192        continue;\n   240\u2192      }\n   241\u2192\n   242\u2192      const tile = this._findFreeInteractTile(target.position, char);\n   243\u2192      if (!tile) {\n   244\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   245\u2192        continue;\n   246\u2192      }\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192      // Already adjacent \u2014 interact directly\n   249\u2192      const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   250\u2192      if (atTarget) {\n   251\u2192        this._doInteraction(char, target, action);\n   252\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   253\u2192      } else if (this._moveCharWithCollision(char, tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   254\u2192        char.targetObjectId = target.id;\n   255\u2192        char.pendingAction = action;\n   256\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   257\u2192      } else {\n   258\u2192        // Path blocked by another character \u2014 schedule retry\n   259\u2192        char._pendingTarget = { obj: target, action, tile };\n   260\u2192        char._retryCount = 1;\n   261\u2192        char._retryTimer = 500 + Math.random() * 500;\n   262\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   263\u2192      }\n   264\u2192    }\n   265\u2192  }\n   266\u2192\n   267\u2192  /** Immediate random wander (no cooldown) \u2014 used as AI fallback. */\n   268\u2192  _randomWander(char) {\n   269\u2192    const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);\n   270\u2192    const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);\n   271\u2192    const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';\n   272\u2192\n   273\u2192    if (!target) return;\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192    const tile = this._findFreeInteractTile(target.position, char);\n   276\u2192    if (!tile) return;\n   277\u2192\n   278\u2192    const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   279\u2192    if (atTarget) {\n   280\u2192      this._doInteraction(char, target, action);\n   281\u2192    } else if (this._moveCharWithCollision(char, tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   282\u2192      char.targetObjectId = target.id;\n   283\u2192      char.pendingAction = action;\n   284\u2192    }\n   285\u2192    // If path blocked, AI will retry naturally on next call\n   286\u2192  }\n   287\u2192\n   288\u2192  _updateCharacters(deltaMs) {\n   289\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   290\u2192      const wasWalking = char.action === 'walking';\n   291\u2192      char.update(deltaMs);\n   292\u2192\n   293\u2192      // Character just arrived at destination\n   294\u2192      if (wasWalking && char.action === 'idle') {\n   295\u2192        if (char.targetObjectId) {\n   296\u2192          const obj = this.objectEngine.get(char.targetObjectId);\n   297\u2192          if (obj) {\n   298\u2192            this._doInteraction(char, obj, char.pendingAction || 'use');\n   299\u2192          } else {\n   300\u2192            char.targetObjectId = null;\n   301\u2192          }\n   302\u2192          char.pendingAction = 'use';\n   303\u2192        } else if (char.targetCharId) {\n   304\u2192          // Character arrived near another character for conversation \u2014 face each other\n   305\u2192          const target = this.characters.find(c => c.id === char.targetCharId);\n   306\u2192          if (target) {\n   307\u2192            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);\n   308\u2192            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);\n   309\u2192          }\n   310\u2192          char.targetCharId = null;\n   311\u2192        } else if (char._pendingTarget) {\n   312\u2192          // Arrived at deadlock-escape tile \u2014 try to re-path to the original goal\n   313\u2192          const { obj, action, tile } = char._pendingTarget;\n   314\u2192          const atTarget = tile.tx === char.tx && tile.ty === char.ty;\n   315\u2192          if (atTarget) {\n   316\u2192            this._doInteraction(char, obj, action);\n   317\u2192            char._pendingTarget = null;\n   318\u2192            char._retryCount = 0;\n   319\u2192          } else if (this._moveCharWithCollision(char, tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   320\u2192            char.targetObjectId = obj.id;\n   321\u2192            char.pendingAction = action;\n   322\u2192            char._pendingTarget = null;\n   323\u2192            char._retryCount = 0;\n   324\u2192          } else {\n   325\u2192            // Still blocked after escape \u2014 give up\n   326\u2192            char._pendingTarget = null;\n   327\u2192            char._retryCount = 0;\n   328\u2192          }\n   329\u2192        }\n   330\u2192      }\n   331\u2192\n   332\u2192      // Retry timer: character is idle, waiting to re-path to a blocked goal\n   333\u2192      if (char.action === 'idle' && char._retryTimer > 0) {\n   334\u2192        char._retryTimer -= deltaMs;\n   335\u2192        if (char._retryTimer <= 0) {\n   336\u2192          char._retryTimer = 0;\n   337\u2192          if (char._pendingTarget) {\n   338\u2192            const { obj, action, tile } = char._pendingTarget;\n   339\u2192            if (this._moveCharWithCollision(char, tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   340\u2192              // Path found \u2014 proceed normally\n   341\u2192              char.targetObjectId = obj.id;\n   342\u2192              char.pendingAction = action;\n   343\u2192              char._pendingTarget = null;\n   344\u2192              char._retryCount = 0;\n   345\u2192            } else if (char._retryCount < 3) {\n   346\u2192              // Still blocked \u2014 wait and try again\n   347\u2192              char._retryCount++;\n   348\u2192              char._retryTimer = 500 + Math.random() * 500;\n   349\u2192            } else {\n   350\u2192              // 3 failures \u2014 escape to an adjacent free tile and re-path from there\n   351\u2192              char._retryCount = 0;\n   352\u2192              this._deadlockEscape(char);\n   353\u2192            }\n   354\u2192          }\n   355\u2192        }\n   356\u2192      }\n   357\u2192    }\n   358\u2192  }\n   359\u2192\n   360\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Object \u2192 interaction animation mapping \u2500\u2500\n   361\u2192  // Maps object ID substrings to the animation played during interaction.\n   362\u2192  static _getInteractAnim(objectId) {\n   363\u2192    if (!objectId) return null;\n   364\u2192    if (objectId.includes('book') || objectId.includes('desk') || objectId.includes('bookshelf')) {\n   365\u2192      return 'reading';\n   366\u2192    }\n   367\u2192    if (objectId.includes('bed') || objectId.includes('kotatsu') || objectId.includes('sofa') || objectId.includes('tv')) {\n   368\u2192      return 'sit';\n   369\u2192    }\n   370\u2192    // phone / general interaction fallback for everything else\n   371\u2192    return 'phone';\n   372\u2192  }\n   373\u2192\n   374\u2192  _doInteraction(char, obj, action = 'use') {\n   375\u2192    // Face toward the object\n   376\u2192    const objCx = obj.position.tx + (obj.position.tw || 1) / 2;\n   377\u2192    const objCy = obj.position.ty + (obj.position.th || 1) / 2;\n   378\u2192    const dx = objCx - char.tx;\n   379\u2192    const dy = objCy - char.ty;\n   380\u2192    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {\n   381\u2192      char._updateFacing(dx, 0);\n   382\u2192    } else {\n   383\u2192      char._updateFacing(0, dy);\n   384\u2192    }\n   385\u2192\n   386\u2192    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(obj.id, action);\n   387\u2192    if (event) {\n   388\u2192      const anim = SimulationEngine._getInteractAnim(obj.id);\n   389\u2192      char.startInteraction(obj.id, anim);\n   390\u2192\n   391\u2192      // Successful interaction \u2192 happy (unless already upset)\n   392\u2192      if (char.mood !== 'upset') {\n   393\u2192        char.setMood('happy', 5000);\n   394\u2192      }\n   395\u2192\n   396\u2192      this._emit('character:interact', {\n   397\u2192        characterId: char.id, characterName: char.name,\n   398\u2192        objectId: obj.id, objectName: event.objectName,\n   399\u2192        from: event.from, to: event.to,\n   400\u2192        produces: event.produces || null,\n   401\u2192        emoji: event.emoji || null,\n   402\u2192      });\n   403\u2192    } else {\n   404\u2192      char.targetObjectId = null;\n   405\u2192    }\n   406\u2192  }\n   407\u2192\n   408\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Collision helpers \u2500\u2500\n   409\u2192\n   410\u2192  /** Returns a Set of tile keys (ty*MAP_COLS+tx) for all characters except `exceptChar`. */\n   411\u2192  _getOccupiedTiles(exceptChar) {\n   412\u2192    const tiles = new Set();\n   413\u2192    for (const c of this.characters) {\n   414\u2192      if (c === exceptChar) continue;\n   415\u2192      tiles.add(c.ty * MAP_COLS + c.tx);\n   416\u2192    }\n   417\u2192    return tiles;\n   418\u2192  }\n   419\u2192\n   420\u2192  /** Like char.moveTo but marks other characters' tiles as unwalkable during A*. */\n   421\u2192  _moveCharWithCollision(char, goalTx, goalTy) {\n   422\u2192    const blocked = this._getOccupiedTiles(char);\n   423\u2192    return char.moveTo(goalTx, goalTy, blocked);\n   424\u2192  }\n   425\u2192\n   426\u2192  /** Like findInteractTile but prefers tiles not currently occupied by other characters. */\n   427\u2192  _findFreeInteractTile(objPosition, char) {\n   428\u2192    const { tx, ty, tw = 1, th = 1 } = objPosition;\n   429\u2192    const occupied = this._getOccupiedTiles(char);\n   430\u2192    const free = [];\n   431\u2192    const all = [];\n   432\u2192\n   433\u2192    const addCandidate = (x, y) => {\n   434\u2192      if (!isWalkable(x, y)) return;\n   435\u2192      const entry = { tx: x, ty: y };\n   436\u2192      all.push(entry);\n   437\u2192      if (!occupied.has(y * MAP_COLS + x)) free.push(entry);\n   438\u2192    };\n   439\u2192\n   440\u2192    for (let x = tx - 1; x <= tx + tw; x++) {\n   441\u2192      addCandidate(x, ty - 1);\n   442\u2192      addCandidate(x, ty + th);\n   443\u2192    }\n   444\u2192    for (let y = ty; y < ty + th; y++) {\n   445\u2192      addCandidate(tx - 1, y);\n   446\u2192      addCandidate(tx + tw, y);\n   447\u2192    }\n   448\u2192\n   449\u2192    const pool = free.length > 0 ? free : all;\n   450\u2192    if (pool.length === 0) return null;\n   451\u2192    return pool[Math.floor(Math.random() * pool.length)];\n   452\u2192  }\n   453\u2192\n   454\u2192  /**\n   455\u2192   * Deadlock escape: move to a random free adjacent tile so the character\n   456\u2192   * can re-path around whatever is blocking them. _pendingTarget is preserved\n   457\u2192   * so the arrival handler knows to re-path to the original goal.\n   458\u2192   */\n   459\u2192  _deadlockEscape(char) {\n   460\u2192    const DIRS = [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]];\n   461\u2192    const occupied = this._getOccupiedTiles(char);\n   462\u2192    // Shuffle directions for variety\n   463\u2192    const dirs = DIRS.slice().sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);\n   464\u2192    for (const [dx, dy] of dirs) {\n   465\u2192      const nx = char.tx + dx;\n   466\u2192      const ny = char.ty + dy;\n   467\u2192      if (isWalkable(nx, ny) && !occupied.has(ny * MAP_COLS + nx)) {\n   468\u2192        // Move one tile \u2014 _pendingTarget stays set; arrival handler will re-path\n   469\u2192        char.moveTo(nx, ny);\n   470\u2192        return;\n   471\u2192      }\n   472\u2192    }\n   473\u2192    // Completely surrounded \u2014 give up\n   474\u2192    char._pendingTarget = null;\n   475\u2192    char._retryCount = 0;\n   476\u2192  }\n   477\u2192\n   478\u2192  _getPriorityTarget(char) {\n   479\u2192    // Sol: pick up book if closed and nearby\n   480\u2192    if (char.id === 'sol') {\n   481\u2192      const book = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_book');\n   482\u2192      if (book && book.state === 'closed') {\n   483\u2192        const dist = Math.abs(book.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(book.position.ty - char.ty);\n   484\u2192        if (dist <= 6) {\n   485\u2192          return { obj: book, action: 'use' };\n   486\u2192        }\n   487\u2192      }\n   488\u2192    }\n   489\u2192\n   490\u2192    // Non-Maple near stocked display \u2192 take pastry\n   491\u2192    if (char.id !== 'maple') {\n   492\u2192      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   493\u2192      if (display && display.state === 'stocked') {\n   494\u2192        const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);\n   495\u2192        if (dist <= 8) {\n   496\u2192          return { obj: display, action: 'use' };\n   497\u2192        }\n   498\u2192      }\n   499\u2192    }\n   500\u2192\n   501\u2192    // Maple: restock empty display case\n   502\u2192    if (char.id === 'maple') {\n   503\u2192      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   504\u2192      if (display && display.state === 'empty') {\n   505\u2192        return { obj: display, action: 'use' };\n   506\u2192      }\n   507\u2192    }\n   508\u2192\n   509\u2192    return null;\n   510\u2192  }\n   511\u2192\n   512\u2192  _pickWanderTarget(char) {\n   513\u2192    const allObjects = this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   514\u2192\n   515\u2192    // 60% home sector, 40% any sector\n   516\u2192    let candidates;\n   517\u2192    if (Math.random() < 0.6) {\n   518\u2192      candidates = allObjects.filter(o => o.sector === char.homeSector);\n   519\u2192      if (candidates.length === 0) candidates = allObjects;\n   520\u2192    } else {\n   521\u2192      candidates = allObjects;\n   522\u2192    }\n   523\u2192\n   524\u2192    // Avoid repeating last interaction\n   525\u2192    if (char.lastObjectId && candidates.length > 1) {\n   526\u2192      candidates = candidates.filter(o => o.id !== char.lastObjectId);\n   527\u2192    }\n   528\u2192\n   529\u2192    if (candidates.length === 0) return null;\n   530\u2192    return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];\n   531\u2192  }\n   532\u2192\n   533\u2192  _reactToObjectEvent(event) {\n   534\u2192    // Espresso done \u2192 Maple happy\n   535\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_espresso' && event.to === 'done') {\n   536\u2192      const maple = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'maple');\n   537\u2192      if (maple) maple.setMood('happy', 10000);\n   538\u2192    }\n   539\u2192\n   540\u2192    // Easel finished \u2192 Nyx happy\n   541\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'apt_easel' && event.to === 'finished') {\n   542\u2192      const nyx = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'nyx');\n   543\u2192      if (nyx) nyx.setMood('happy', 20000);\n   544\u2192    }\n   545\u2192\n   546\u2192    // Display restocked \u2192 nearby characters happy\n   547\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_display' && event.to === 'stocked') {\n   548\u2192      for (const char of this.characters) {\n   549\u2192        const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   550\u2192        if (display) {\n   551\u2192          const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);\n   552\u2192          if (dist <= 6) char.setMood('happy', 10000);\n   553\u2192        }\n   554\u2192      }\n   555\u2192    }\n   556\u2192  }\n   557\u2192\n   558\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Internal loop \u2500\u2500\n   559\u2192\n   560\u2192  _loop() {\n   561\u2192    if (!this.running) return;\n   562\u2192\n   563\u2192    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame((timestamp) => {\n   564\u2192      if (!this.running) return;\n   565\u2192\n   566\u2192      if (!this.paused) {\n   567\u2192        const rawDelta = timestamp - this._lastTimestamp;\n   568\u2192        const delta = Math.min(rawDelta, 500) * this.timeScale; // cap delta, apply scale\n   569\u2192\n   570\u2192        this._accumulator += delta;\n   571\u2192\n   572\u2192        // Process full ticks\n   573\u2192        while (this._accumulator >= this.tickIntervalMs) {\n   574\u2192          this._accumulator -= this.tickIntervalMs;\n   575\u2192          const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   576\u2192          this.tickCount++;\n   577\u2192          this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;\n   578\u2192\n   579\u2192          this._wanderTick();\n   580\u2192\n   581\u2192          this._emit('engine:tick', {\n   582\u2192            tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   583\u2192            elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   584\u2192            events: tickEvents,\n   585\u2192          });\n   586\u2192        }\n   587\u2192\n   588\u2192        // Smooth character movement each frame\n   589\u2192        this._updateCharacters(delta);\n   590\u2192      }\n   591\u2192\n   592\u2192      this._lastTimestamp = timestamp;\n   593\u2192      this._loop();\n   594\u2192    });\n   595\u2192  }\n   596\u2192}\n   597\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

SUCCESS 
     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Character System — Movement, Perception, A* Pathfinding
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Characters have: id, name, personality, position, action state,
     6→// mood, energy, facing direction. They move between tiles using
     7→// A* pathfinding on the walkable tilemap.
     8→//
     9→// Walk animation alternates walk1/walk2 sprites while moving.
    10→// Perception system returns nearby objects and characters within radius.
    11→
    12→import { MAP, T, MAP_COLS, MAP_ROWS, TILE_SIZE } from './tilemap.js';
    13→
    14→// ── Walkable tiles (everything except walls, fences, water) ──
    15→const UNWALKABLE = new Set([T.WALL, T.WALL_TOP, T.COUNTER, T.COUNTER_L, T.COUNTER_R, T.WINDOW]);
    16→
    17→export function isWalkable(tx, ty) {
    18→  if (tx < 0 || tx >= MAP_COLS || ty < 0 || ty >= MAP_ROWS) return false;
    19→  return !UNWALKABLE.has(MAP[ty][tx]);
    20→}
    21→
    22→// ── A* Pathfinding ──
    23→// Returns array of {tx, ty} waypoints (excludes start, includes goal),
    24→// or null if no path found. Returns [] if already at goal.
    25→
    26→const NEIGHBORS = [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]];
    27→
    28→// extraBlocked: optional Set of tile keys (ty*MAP_COLS+tx) to treat as unwalkable.
    29→// Used to mark other characters' current positions during pathfinding.
    30→export function findPath(sx, sy, gx, gy, extraBlocked = null) {
    31→  if (!isWalkable(gx, gy)) return null;
    32→
    33→  const startKey = sy * MAP_COLS + sx;
    34→  const goalKey = gy * MAP_COLS + gx;
    35→  if (startKey === goalKey) return [];
    36→
    37→  const open = [startKey];
    38→  const cameFrom = new Map();
    39→  const gScore = new Map([[startKey, 0]]);
    40→  const fScore = new Map([[startKey, Math.abs(sx - gx) + Math.abs(sy - gy)]]);
    41→  const closed = new Set();
    42→
    43→  while (open.length > 0) {
    44→    // Find node with lowest fScore
    45→    let bestIdx = 0;
    46→    let bestF = fScore.get(open[0]) ?? Infinity;
    47→    for (let i = 1; i < open.length; i++) {
    48→      const f = fScore.get(open[i]) ?? Infinity;
    49→      if (f < bestF) { bestF = f; bestIdx = i; }
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    const current = open[bestIdx];
    53→    if (current === goalKey) {
    54→      const path = [];
    55→      let c = current;
    56→      while (cameFrom.has(c)) {
    57→        path.unshift({ tx: c % MAP_COLS, ty: Math.floor(c / MAP_COLS) });
    58→        c = cameFrom.get(c);
    59→      }
    60→      return path;
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    open.splice(bestIdx, 1);
    64→    closed.add(current);
    65→
    66→    const cx = current % MAP_COLS;
    67→    const cy = Math.floor(current / MAP_COLS);
    68→
    69→    for (const [dx, dy] of NEIGHBORS) {
    70→      const nx = cx + dx;
    71→      const ny = cy + dy;
    72→      if (!isWalkable(nx, ny)) continue;
    73→
    74→      const nKey = ny * MAP_COLS + nx;
    75→      if (closed.has(nKey)) continue;
    76→      // Skip tiles blocked by other characters (but always allow the goal tile)
    77→      if (extraBlocked && nKey !== goalKey && extraBlocked.has(nKey)) continue;
    78→
    79→      const tentG = (gScore.get(current) ?? Infinity) + 1;
    80→      if (tentG < (gScore.get(nKey) ?? Infinity)) {
    81→        cameFrom.set(nKey, current);
    82→        gScore.set(nKey, tentG);
    83→        fScore.set(nKey, tentG + Math.abs(nx - gx) + Math.abs(ny - gy));
    84→        if (!open.includes(nKey)) open.push(nKey);
    85→      }
    86→    }
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  return null; // no path
    90→}
    91→
    92→// ── Find walkable tile adjacent to an object (for interaction) ──
    93→export function findInteractTile(objPosition) {
    94→  const { tx, ty, tw = 1, th = 1 } = objPosition;
    95→  const candidates = [];
    96→
    97→  for (let x = tx - 1; x <= tx + tw; x++) {
    98→    if (isWalkable(x, ty - 1)) candidates.push({ tx: x, ty: ty - 1 });
    99→    if (isWalkable(x, ty + th)) candidates.push({ tx: x, ty: ty + th });
   100→  }
   101→  for (let y = ty; y < ty + th; y++) {
   102→    if (isWalkable(tx - 1, y)) candidates.push({ tx: tx - 1, ty: y });
   103→    if (isWalkable(tx + tw, y)) candidates.push({ tx: tx + tw, ty: y });
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  if (candidates.length === 0) return null;
   107→  return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
   108→}
   109→
   110→// ── Character class ──
   111→
   112→export class Character {
   113→  constructor(def) {
   114→    this.id = def.id;
   115→    this.name = def.name;
   116→    this.personality = def.personality;
   117→    this.tx = def.tx;
   118→    this.ty = def.ty;
   119→    this.homeSector = def.sector;
   120→    this.energy = 100;
   121→    this.facing = 'down'; // up | down | left | right
   122→    this.action = 'idle'; // idle | walking | interacting
   123→    this.colors = def.colors; // fallback render colors
   124→
   125→    // Movement
   126→    this.path = [];          // waypoints to follow
   127→    this.moveProgress = 0;   // 0–1 progress toward next waypoint
   128→    this.moveSpeed = 2.0;    // tiles per second
   129→    this.prevTx = def.tx;
   130→    this.prevTy = def.ty;
   131→
   132→    // Walk animation (4-frame cycle: walk1→walk2→walk3→walk4)
   133→    this.walkFrame = 0;      // 0–3 → walk1/walk2/walk3/walk4
   134→    this.walkTimer = 0;
   135→    this.walkFrameMs = 200;  // ms between frame advances
   136→
   137→    // Wander AI
   138→    this.targetObjectId = null;
   139→    this.wanderCooldown = 2000 + Math.random() * 5000; // start soon
   140→    this.interactTimer = 0;
   141→
   142→    // Interaction tracking
   143→    this.lastObjectId = null;
   144→    this.pendingAction = 'use';
   145→    this.interactAnim = null;    // 'reading' | 'sit' | 'phone' | null (uses idle when null)
   146→    this.targetCharId = null;   // ID of a character to face toward upon arrival
   147→
   148→    // Mood system
   149→    this.mood = 'content';       // happy | content | neutral | upset
   150→    this.moodTimer = 0;          // ms until mood resets to content
   151→
   152→    // Collision retry state (managed by SimulationEngine)
   153→    this._pendingTarget = null;  // { obj, action, tile } — blocked goal awaiting retry
   154→    this._retryCount = 0;        // number of failed path attempts for current goal
   155→    this._retryTimer = 0;        // ms until next retry attempt
   156→  }
   157→
   158→  /** Sprite key for the current animation frame. */
   159→  get spriteKey() {
   160→    if (this.action === 'walking') {
   161→      return `${this.id}_walk${this.walkFrame + 1}`;
   162→    }
   163→    if (this.action === 'interacting' && this.interactAnim) {
   164→      return `${this.id}_${this.interactAnim}`;
   165→    }
   166→    return `${this.id}_idle`;
   167→  }
   168→
   169→  get moodEmoji() {
   170→    switch (this.mood) {
   171→      case 'happy': return '😊';
   172→      case 'content': return '😌';
   173→      case 'upset': return '😤';
   174→      default: return null;
   175→    }
   176→  }
   177→
   178→  /** Pixel X position (interpolated between tiles for smooth movement). */
   179→  get px() {
   180→    if (this.path.length === 0) return this.tx * TILE_SIZE;
   181→    const next = this.path[0];
   182→    return (this.prevTx + (next.tx - this.prevTx) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE;
   183→  }
   184→
   185→  /** Pixel Y position (interpolated between tiles for smooth movement). */
   186→  get py() {
   187→    if (this.path.length === 0) return this.ty * TILE_SIZE;
   188→    const next = this.path[0];
   189→    return (this.prevTy + (next.ty - this.prevTy) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE;
   190→  }
   191→
   192→  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found.
   193→   *  @param {Set|null} extraBlocked - tile keys blocked by other characters.
   194→   */
   195→  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy, extraBlocked = null) {
   196→    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy, extraBlocked);
   197→    if (path && path.length > 0) {
   198→      this.path = path;
   199→      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);
   200→      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);
   201→      this.moveProgress = 0;
   202→      this.walkFrame = 0;
   203→      this.walkTimer = 0;
   204→      this.action = 'walking';
   205→      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);
   206→      return true;
   207→    }
   208→    return false;
   209→  }
   210→
   211→  /** Per-frame update: advance position and animation. */
   212→  update(deltaMs) {
   213→    if (this.action === 'walking' && this.path.length > 0) {
   214→      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)
   215→      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;
   216→      while (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {
   217→        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;
   218→        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;
   219→      }
   220→
   221→      // Advance position along path
   222→      const tileDurationMs = 1000 / this.moveSpeed;
   223→      this.moveProgress += deltaMs / tileDurationMs;
   224→
   225→      while (this.moveProgress >= 1 && this.path.length > 0) {
   226→        this.moveProgress -= 1;
   227→        const arrived = this.path.shift();
   228→        this.tx = arrived.tx;
   229→        this.ty = arrived.ty;
   230→        this.prevTx = arrived.tx;
   231→        this.prevTy = arrived.ty;
   232→
   233→        if (this.path.length > 0) {
   234→          this._updateFacing(this.path[0].tx - this.tx, this.path[0].ty - this.ty);
   235→        }
   236→      }
   237→
   238→      // Arrived at destination
   239→      if (this.path.length === 0) {
   240→        this.moveProgress = 0;
   241→        this.action = 'idle';
   242→      }
   243→    } else if (this.action === 'interacting') {
   244→      this.interactTimer -= deltaMs;
   245→      if (this.interactTimer <= 0) {
   246→        this.action = 'idle';
   247→        this.targetObjectId = null;
   248→        this.interactAnim = null;
   249→      }
   250→    }
   251→
   252→    // Decay mood back to content
   253→    if (this.moodTimer > 0) {
   254→      this.moodTimer -= deltaMs;
   255→      if (this.moodTimer <= 0) {
   256→        this.mood = 'content';
   257→        this.moodTimer = 0;
   258→      }
   259→    }
   260→  }
   261→
   262→  _updateFacing(dx, dy) {
   263→    if (dx > 0) this.facing = 'right';
   264→    else if (dx < 0) this.facing = 'left';
   265→    else if (dy > 0) this.facing = 'down';
   266→    else if (dy < 0) this.facing = 'up';
   267→  }
   268→
   269→  /** Enter interaction state (after arriving at an object).
   270→   *  @param {string} objectId - ID of the object being interacted with.
   271→   *  @param {string|null} anim - Animation to play: 'reading' | 'sit' | 'phone' | null.
   272→   */
   273→  startInteraction(objectId, anim = null) {
   274→    this.action = 'interacting';
   275→    this.targetObjectId = objectId;
   276→    this.lastObjectId = objectId;
   277→    this.interactTimer = 2000;
   278→    this.interactAnim = anim;
   279→  }
   280→
   281→  setMood(mood, durationMs = 15000) {
   282→    this.mood = mood;
   283→    this.moodTimer = durationMs;
   284→  }
   285→
   286→  /** Get nearby objects and characters within Manhattan distance radius. */
   287→  getPerception(objects, characters, radius = 5) {
   288→    const nearbyObjects = [];
   289→    const nearbyCharacters = [];
   290→
   291→    for (const obj of objects) {
   292→      const dist = Math.abs(obj.position.tx - this.tx) + Math.abs(obj.position.ty - this.ty);
   293→      if (dist <= radius) {
   294→        nearbyObjects.push({
   295→          id: obj.id,
   296→          name: obj.name,
   297→          state: obj.state,
   298→          distance: dist,
   299→          sector: obj.sector,
   300→        });
   301→      }
   302→    }
   303→
   304→    for (const char of characters) {
   305→      if (char.id === this.id) continue;
   306→      const dist = Math.abs(char.tx - this.tx) + Math.abs(char.ty - this.ty);
   307→      if (dist <= radius) {
   308→        nearbyCharacters.push({
   309→          id: char.id,
   310→          name: char.name,
   311→          action: char.action,
   312→          distance: dist,
   313→        });
   314→      }
   315→    }
   316→
   317→    return { objects: nearbyObjects, characters: nearbyCharacters };
   318→  }
   319→}
   320→
   321→// ── Character definitions ──
   322→
   323→export const CHARACTER_DEFS = [
   324→  {
   325→    id: 'maple',
   326→    name: 'Maple',
   327→    personality: 'Warm, chatty barista who takes pride in her coffee. Runs the café downstairs.',
   328→    sector: 'cafe',
   329→    tx: 3, ty: 12,
   330→    colors: { body: '#e8a87c', hair: '#d4543b', outfit: '#f5e6cc' },
   331→  },
   332→  {
   333→    id: 'sol',
   334→    name: 'Sol',
   335→    personality: 'Quiet, bookish regular who loves the window seat. Friendly when approached.',
   336→    sector: 'cafe',
   337→    tx: 10, ty: 16,
   338→    colors: { body: '#b5835a', hair: '#2d5e2a', outfit: '#7ab648' },
   339→  },
   340→  {
   341→    id: 'nyx',
   342→    name: 'Nyx',
   343→    personality: 'Creative night owl who lives upstairs. Paints, cooks, and is slightly scatterbrained.',
   344→    sector: 'apartment',
   345→    tx: 3, ty: 4,
   346→    colors: { body: '#c4aed0', hair: '#3a2d5e', outfit: '#1a1a2e' },
   347→  },
   348→];
   349→
