{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_012fTs8hnitA87ZCyeTGpT7n",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     2\u2192// Character System \u2014 Movement, Perception, A* Pathfinding\n     3\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Characters have: id, name, personality, position, action state,\n     6\u2192// mood, energy, facing direction. They move between tiles using\n     7\u2192// A* pathfinding on the walkable tilemap.\n     8\u2192//\n     9\u2192// Walk animation alternates walk1/walk2 sprites while moving.\n    10\u2192// Perception system returns nearby objects and characters within radius.\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192import { MAP, T, MAP_COLS, MAP_ROWS, TILE_SIZE } from './tilemap.js';\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Walkable tiles (everything except walls, fences, water) \u2500\u2500\n    15\u2192const UNWALKABLE = new Set([T.WALL, T.WALL_TOP, T.COUNTER, T.COUNTER_L, T.COUNTER_R, T.WINDOW]);\n    16\u2192\n    17\u2192export function isWalkable(tx, ty) {\n    18\u2192  if (tx < 0 || tx >= MAP_COLS || ty < 0 || ty >= MAP_ROWS) return false;\n    19\u2192  return !UNWALKABLE.has(MAP[ty][tx]);\n    20\u2192}\n    21\u2192\n    22\u2192// \u2500\u2500 A* Pathfinding \u2500\u2500\n    23\u2192// Returns array of {tx, ty} waypoints (excludes start, includes goal),\n    24\u2192// or null if no path found. Returns [] if already at goal.\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192const NEIGHBORS = [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]];\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192// extraBlocked: optional Set of tile keys (ty*MAP_COLS+tx) to treat as unwalkable.\n    29\u2192// Used to mark other characters' current positions during pathfinding.\n    30\u2192export function findPath(sx, sy, gx, gy, extraBlocked = null) {\n    31\u2192  if (!isWalkable(gx, gy)) return null;\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192  const startKey = sy * MAP_COLS + sx;\n    34\u2192  const goalKey = gy * MAP_COLS + gx;\n    35\u2192  if (startKey === goalKey) return [];\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192  const open = [startKey];\n    38\u2192  const cameFrom = new Map();\n    39\u2192  const gScore = new Map([[startKey, 0]]);\n    40\u2192  const fScore = new Map([[startKey, Math.abs(sx - gx) + Math.abs(sy - gy)]]);\n    41\u2192  const closed = new Set();\n    42\u2192\n    43\u2192  while (open.length > 0) {\n    44\u2192    // Find node with lowest fScore\n    45\u2192    let bestIdx = 0;\n    46\u2192    let bestF = fScore.get(open[0]) ?? Infinity;\n    47\u2192    for (let i = 1; i < open.length; i++) {\n    48\u2192      const f = fScore.get(open[i]) ?? Infinity;\n    49\u2192      if (f < bestF) { bestF = f; bestIdx = i; }\n    50\u2192    }\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192    const current = open[bestIdx];\n    53\u2192    if (current === goalKey) {\n    54\u2192      const path = [];\n    55\u2192      let c = current;\n    56\u2192      while (cameFrom.has(c)) {\n    57\u2192        path.unshift({ tx: c % MAP_COLS, ty: Math.floor(c / MAP_COLS) });\n    58\u2192        c = cameFrom.get(c);\n    59\u2192      }\n    60\u2192      return path;\n    61\u2192    }\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192    open.splice(bestIdx, 1);\n    64\u2192    closed.add(current);\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192    const cx = current % MAP_COLS;\n    67\u2192    const cy = Math.floor(current / MAP_COLS);\n    68\u2192\n    69\u2192    for (const [dx, dy] of NEIGHBORS) {\n    70\u2192      const nx = cx + dx;\n    71\u2192      const ny = cy + dy;\n    72\u2192      if (!isWalkable(nx, ny)) continue;\n    73\u2192\n    74\u2192      const nKey = ny * MAP_COLS + nx;\n    75\u2192      if (closed.has(nKey)) continue;\n    76\u2192      // Skip tiles blocked by other characters (but always allow the goal tile)\n    77\u2192      if (extraBlocked && nKey !== goalKey && extraBlocked.has(nKey)) continue;\n    78\u2192\n    79\u2192      const tentG = (gScore.get(current) ?? Infinity) + 1;\n    80\u2192      if (tentG < (gScore.get(nKey) ?? Infinity)) {\n    81\u2192        cameFrom.set(nKey, current);\n    82\u2192        gScore.set(nKey, tentG);\n    83\u2192        fScore.set(nKey, tentG + Math.abs(nx - gx) + Math.abs(ny - gy));\n    84\u2192        if (!open.includes(nKey)) open.push(nKey);\n    85\u2192      }\n    86\u2192    }\n    87\u2192  }\n    88\u2192\n    89\u2192  return null; // no path\n    90\u2192}\n    91\u2192\n    92\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Find walkable tile adjacent to an object (for interaction) \u2500\u2500\n    93\u2192export function findInteractTile(objPosition) {\n    94\u2192  const { tx, ty, tw = 1, th = 1 } = objPosition;\n    95\u2192  const candidates = [];\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192  for (let x = tx - 1; x <= tx + tw; x++) {\n    98\u2192    if (isWalkable(x, ty - 1)) candidates.push({ tx: x, ty: ty - 1 });\n    99\u2192    if (isWalkable(x, ty + th)) candidates.push({ tx: x, ty: ty + th });\n   100\u2192  }\n   101\u2192  for (let y = ty; y < ty + th; y++) {\n   102\u2192    if (isWalkable(tx - 1, y)) candidates.push({ tx: tx - 1, ty: y });\n   103\u2192    if (isWalkable(tx + tw, y)) candidates.push({ tx: tx + tw, ty: y });\n   104\u2192  }\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192  if (candidates.length === 0) return null;\n   107\u2192  return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];\n   108\u2192}\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Character class \u2500\u2500\n   111\u2192\n   112\u2192export class Character {\n   113\u2192  constructor(def) {\n   114\u2192    this.id = def.id;\n   115\u2192    this.name = def.name;\n   116\u2192    this.personality = def.personality;\n   117\u2192    this.tx = def.tx;\n   118\u2192    this.ty = def.ty;\n   119\u2192    this.homeSector = def.sector;\n   120\u2192    this.energy = 100;\n   121\u2192    this.facing = 'down'; // up | down | left | right\n   122\u2192    this.action = 'idle'; // idle | walking | interacting\n   123\u2192    this.colors = def.colors; // fallback render colors\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192    // Movement\n   126\u2192    this.path = [];          // waypoints to follow\n   127\u2192    this.moveProgress = 0;   // 0\u20131 progress toward next waypoint\n   128\u2192    this.moveSpeed = 2.0;    // tiles per second\n   129\u2192    this.prevTx = def.tx;\n   130\u2192    this.prevTy = def.ty;\n   131\u2192\n   132\u2192    // Walk animation (4-frame cycle: walk1\u2192walk2\u2192walk3\u2192walk4)\n   133\u2192    this.walkFrame = 0;      // 0\u20133 \u2192 walk1/walk2/walk3/walk4\n   134\u2192    this.walkTimer = 0;\n   135\u2192    this.walkFrameMs = 200;  // ms between frame advances\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192    // Wander AI\n   138\u2192    this.targetObjectId = null;\n   139\u2192    this.wanderCooldown = 2000 + Math.random() * 5000; // start soon\n   140\u2192    this.interactTimer = 0;\n   141\u2192\n   142\u2192    // Interaction tracking\n   143\u2192    this.lastObjectId = null;\n   144\u2192    this.pendingAction = 'use';\n   145\u2192    this.interactAnim = null;    // 'reading' | 'sit' | 'phone' | null (uses idle when null)\n   146\u2192    this.targetCharId = null;   // ID of a character to face toward upon arrival\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192    // Mood system\n   149\u2192    this.mood = 'content';       // happy | content | neutral | upset\n   150\u2192    this.moodTimer = 0;          // ms until mood resets to content\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192    // Collision retry state (managed by SimulationEngine)\n   153\u2192    this._pendingTarget = null;  // { obj, action, tile } \u2014 blocked goal awaiting retry\n   154\u2192    this._retryCount = 0;        // number of failed path attempts for current goal\n   155\u2192    this._retryTimer = 0;        // ms until next retry attempt\n   156\u2192  }\n   157\u2192\n   158\u2192  /** Sprite key for the current animation frame. */\n   159\u2192  get spriteKey() {\n   160\u2192    if (this.action === 'walking') {\n   161\u2192      return `${this.id}_walk${this.walkFrame + 1}`;\n   162\u2192    }\n   163\u2192    if (this.action === 'interacting' && this.interactAnim) {\n   164\u2192      return `${this.id}_${this.interactAnim}`;\n   165\u2192    }\n   166\u2192    return `${this.id}_idle`;\n   167\u2192  }\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192  get moodEmoji() {\n   170\u2192    switch (this.mood) {\n   171\u2192      case 'happy': return '\ud83d\ude0a';\n   172\u2192      case 'content': return '\ud83d\ude0c';\n   173\u2192      case 'upset': return '\ud83d\ude24';\n   174\u2192      default: return null;\n   175\u2192    }\n   176\u2192  }\n   177\u2192\n   178\u2192  /** Pixel X position (interpolated between tiles for smooth movement). */\n   179\u2192  get px() {\n   180\u2192    if (this.path.length === 0) return this.tx * TILE_SIZE;\n   181\u2192    const next = this.path[0];\n   182\u2192    return (this.prevTx + (next.tx - this.prevTx) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE;\n   183\u2192  }\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192  /** Pixel Y position (interpolated between tiles for smooth movement). */\n   186\u2192  get py() {\n   187\u2192    if (this.path.length === 0) return this.ty * TILE_SIZE;\n   188\u2192    const next = this.path[0];\n   189\u2192    return (this.prevTy + (next.ty - this.prevTy) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE;\n   190\u2192  }\n   191\u2192\n   192\u2192  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found.\n   193\u2192   *  @param {Set|null} extraBlocked - tile keys blocked by other characters.\n   194\u2192   */\n   195\u2192  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy, extraBlocked = null) {\n   196\u2192    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy, extraBlocked);\n   197\u2192    if (path && path.length > 0) {\n   198\u2192      this.path = path;\n   199\u2192      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);\n   200\u2192      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);\n   201\u2192      this.moveProgress = 0;\n   202\u2192      this.walkFrame = 0;\n   203\u2192      this.walkTimer = 0;\n   204\u2192      this.action = 'walking';\n   205\u2192      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);\n   206\u2192      return true;\n   207\u2192    }\n   208\u2192    return false;\n   209\u2192  }\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192  /** Per-frame update: advance position and animation. */\n   212\u2192  update(deltaMs) {\n   213\u2192    if (this.action === 'walking' && this.path.length > 0) {\n   214\u2192      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)\n   215\u2192      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;\n   216\u2192      while (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {\n   217\u2192        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;\n   218\u2192        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;\n   219\u2192      }\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192      // Advance position along path\n   222\u2192      const tileDurationMs = 1000 / this.moveSpeed;\n   223\u2192      this.moveProgress += deltaMs / tileDurationMs;\n   224\u2192\n   225\u2192      while (this.moveProgress >= 1 && this.path.length > 0) {\n   226\u2192        this.moveProgress -= 1;\n   227\u2192        const arrived = this.path.shift();\n   228\u2192        this.tx = arrived.tx;\n   229\u2192        this.ty = arrived.ty;\n   230\u2192        this.prevTx = arrived.tx;\n   231\u2192        this.prevTy = arrived.ty;\n   232\u2192\n   233\u2192        if (this.path.length > 0) {\n   234\u2192          this._updateFacing(this.path[0].tx - this.tx, this.path[0].ty - this.ty);\n   235\u2192        }\n   236\u2192      }\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192      // Arrived at destination\n   239\u2192      if (this.path.length === 0) {\n   240\u2192        this.moveProgress = 0;\n   241\u2192        this.action = 'idle';\n   242\u2192      }\n   243\u2192    } else if (this.action === 'interacting') {\n   244\u2192      this.interactTimer -= deltaMs;\n   245\u2192      if (this.interactTimer <= 0) {\n   246\u2192        this.action = 'idle';\n   247\u2192        this.targetObjectId = null;\n   248\u2192        this.interactAnim = null;\n   249\u2192      }\n   250\u2192    }\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192    // Decay mood back to content\n   253\u2192    if (this.moodTimer > 0) {\n   254\u2192      this.moodTimer -= deltaMs;\n   255\u2192      if (this.moodTimer <= 0) {\n   256\u2192        this.mood = 'content';\n   257\u2192        this.moodTimer = 0;\n   258\u2192      }\n   259\u2192    }\n   260\u2192  }\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192  _updateFacing(dx, dy) {\n   263\u2192    if (dx > 0) this.facing = 'right';\n   264\u2192    else if (dx < 0) this.facing = 'left';\n   265\u2192    else if (dy > 0) this.facing = 'down';\n   266\u2192    else if (dy < 0) this.facing = 'up';\n   267\u2192  }\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192  /** Enter interaction state (after arriving at an object).\n   270\u2192   *  @param {string} objectId - ID of the object being interacted with.\n   271\u2192   *  @param {string|null} anim - Animation to play: 'reading' | 'sit' | 'phone' | null.\n   272\u2192   */\n   273\u2192  startInteraction(objectId, anim = null) {\n   274\u2192    this.action = 'interacting';\n   275\u2192    this.targetObjectId = objectId;\n   276\u2192    this.lastObjectId = objectId;\n   277\u2192    this.interactTimer = 2000;\n   278\u2192    this.interactAnim = anim;\n   279\u2192  }\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192  setMood(mood, durationMs = 15000) {\n   282\u2192    this.mood = mood;\n   283\u2192    this.moodTimer = durationMs;\n   284\u2192  }\n   285\u2192\n   286\u2192  /** Get nearby objects and characters within Manhattan distance radius. */\n   287\u2192  getPerception(objects, characters, radius = 5) {\n   288\u2192    const nearbyObjects = [];\n   289\u2192    const nearbyCharacters = [];\n   290\u2192\n   291\u2192    for (const obj of objects) {\n   292\u2192      const dist = Math.abs(obj.position.tx - this.tx) + Math.abs(obj.position.ty - this.ty);\n   293\u2192      if (dist <= radius) {\n   294\u2192        nearbyObjects.push({\n   295\u2192          id: obj.id,\n   296\u2192          name: obj.name,\n   297\u2192          state: obj.state,\n   298\u2192          distance: dist,\n   299\u2192          sector: obj.sector,\n   300\u2192        });\n   301\u2192      }\n   302\u2192    }\n   303\u2192\n   304\u2192    for (const char of characters) {\n   305\u2192      if (char.id === this.id) continue;\n   306\u2192      const dist = Math.abs(char.tx - this.tx) + Math.abs(char.ty - this.ty);\n   307\u2192      if (dist <= radius) {\n   308\u2192        nearbyCharacters.push({\n   309\u2192          id: char.id,\n   310\u2192          name: char.name,\n   311\u2192          action: char.action,\n   312\u2192          distance: dist,\n   313\u2192        });\n   314\u2192      }\n   315\u2192    }\n   316\u2192\n   317\u2192    return { objects: nearbyObjects, characters: nearbyCharacters };\n   318\u2192  }\n   319\u2192}\n   320\u2192\n   321\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Character definitions \u2500\u2500\n   322\u2192\n   323\u2192export const CHARACTER_DEFS = [\n   324\u2192  {\n   325\u2192    id: 'maple',\n   326\u2192    name: 'Maple',\n   327\u2192    personality: 'Warm, chatty barista who takes pride in her coffee. Runs the caf\u00e9 downstairs.',\n   328\u2192    sector: 'cafe',\n   329\u2192    tx: 3, ty: 12,\n   330\u2192    colors: { body: '#e8a87c', hair: '#d4543b', outfit: '#f5e6cc' },\n   331\u2192  },\n   332\u2192  {\n   333\u2192    id: 'sol',\n   334\u2192    name: 'Sol',\n   335\u2192    personality: 'Quiet, bookish regular who loves the window seat. Friendly when approached.',\n   336\u2192    sector: 'cafe',\n   337\u2192    tx: 10, ty: 16,\n   338\u2192    colors: { body: '#b5835a', hair: '#2d5e2a', outfit: '#7ab648' },\n   339\u2192  },\n   340\u2192  {\n   341\u2192    id: 'nyx',\n   342\u2192    name: 'Nyx',\n   343\u2192    personality: 'Creative night owl who lives upstairs. Paints, cooks, and is slightly scatterbrained.',\n   344\u2192    sector: 'apartment',\n   345\u2192    tx: 3, ty: 4,\n   346\u2192    colors: { body: '#c4aed0', hair: '#3a2d5e', outfit: '#1a1a2e' },\n   347\u2192  },\n   348\u2192];\n   349\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

     1→/**
     2→ * Café tilemap — two-floor cozy café scene
     3→ * Upper: Nyx's apartment | Lower: Maple's café
     4→ * Stacked vertically in the map array
     5→ */
     6→
     7→export const TILE_SIZE = 48;
     8→export const MAP_COLS = 16;
     9→export const MAP_ROWS = 24;  // 8 apartment + 2 separator + 14 café
    10→export const MAP_W = MAP_COLS * TILE_SIZE;
    11→export const MAP_H = MAP_ROWS * TILE_SIZE;
    12→
    13→// ── Tile type IDs ──
    14→export const T = {
    15→  FLOOR_WOOD:    0,
    16→  FLOOR_TILE:    1,
    17→  WALL:          2,
    18→  COUNTER:       3,
    19→  WINDOW:        4,
    20→  DOOR:          5,
    21→  STAIRS:        6,
    22→  GRASS:         7,
    23→  FLOOR_CARPET:  8,
    24→  WALL_TOP:      9,
    25→  COUNTER_L:    10,
    26→  COUNTER_R:    11,
    27→  FLOOR_DARK:   12,
    28→  SIDEWALK:     13,
    29→};
    30→
    31→// ── Fallback colors ──
    32→export const TILE_COLORS = {
    33→  [T.FLOOR_WOOD]:   '#c2956b',
    34→  [T.FLOOR_TILE]:   '#d4c5a9',
    35→  [T.WALL]:         '#5a4a3a',
    36→  [T.COUNTER]:      '#8b6d4a',

    44→  [T.COUNTER_R]:    '#7b5d3a',

    48→
    49→// ── Tile sprite paths ──
    50→export const TILE_SPRITES = {
    51→  [T.FLOOR_WOOD]:   'assets/cafe/tiles/floor_wood.png',
    52→  [T.FLOOR_TILE]:   'assets/cafe/tiles/floor_tile.png',
    53→  [T.WALL]:         'assets/cafe/tiles/wall_cafe.png',

    58→  [T.GRASS]:        'assets/cafe/tiles/grass.png',

    60→  [T.WALL_TOP]:     'assets/cafe/tiles/wall_cafe_top.png',
    61→  [T.COUNTER_L]:    'assets/cafe/tiles/counter_left.png',
    62→  [T.COUNTER_R]:    'assets/cafe/tiles/counter_right.png',
    63→  [T.FLOOR_DARK]:   'assets/cafe/tiles/floor_wood_dark.png',
    64→  [T.SIDEWALK]:     'assets/cafe/tiles/sidewalk.png',
    65→};
    66→
    67→// Shorthand
    68→const F = T.FLOOR_WOOD;
    69→const I = T.FLOOR_TILE;  // tile floor
    70→const W = T.WALL;
    71→const C = T.COUNTER;
    72→const N = T.WINDOW;
    73→const D = T.DOOR;
    74→const S = T.STAIRS;

\u2500\u2500\n    14\u2192export const T = {\n    15\u2192  FLOOR_WOOD:    0,\n    16\u2192  FLOOR_TILE:    1,\n    17\u2192  WALL:          2,\n    18\u2192  COUNTER:       3,\n    19\u2192  WINDOW: 231\u2192  { type: 'plant_tall',     tx: 14, ty: 1,  tw: 1, th: 3 },  // tall plant in kitchen corner\n   232\u2192  { type: 'table_small',    tx: 9,  ty: 1 },  // kitchen prep counter\n   233\u2192  { type: 'lamp_table',     tx: 11, ty: 1 },  // kitchen counter lamp\n   234\u2192  { type: 'table_small',    tx: 9,  ty: 3 },  // kitchen dining table\n   235\u2192  { type: 'stool',          tx: 8,  ty: 3 },  // kitchen seat 1\n   236\u2192  { type: 'stool',          tx: 10, ty: 3 },  // kitchen seat 2\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 LIVING ZONE (bottom-right, cols 9-14, rows 4-6) \u2500\u2500\n   239\u2192  { type: 'fireplace',      tx: 13, ty: 4,  tw: 2, th: 2 },  // fireplace against right wall\n   240\u2192  { type: 'sofa',           tx: 10, ty: 5,  tw: 2, th: 2 },  // sofa on rug\n   241\u2192  { type: 'table_small',    tx: 12, ty: 5 },  // coffee table\n   242\u2192  { type: 'lamp_floor',     tx: 9,  ty: 5 },  // floor lamp by sofa\n   243\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',    tx: 14, ty: 5 },  // plant beside fireplace\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 ZONE DIVIDER \u2500\u2500\n   246\u2192  { type: 'plant_tall',     tx: 7,  ty: 4,  tw: 1, th: 3 },  // central zone-dividing plant\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 CORNER PLANTS (\u22652 required) \u2500\u2500\n   249\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',    tx: 1,  ty: 5 },  // bottom-left corner plant\n   250\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',    tx: 3,  ty: 5 },  // art zone lower fill\n   251\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',    tx: 14, ty: 6 },  // bottom-right corner plant\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192  // === GROUND FLOOR \u2014 Maple's Caf\u00e9 ===\n   254\u2192\n   255\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Counter Zone (cols 1-6) \u2500\u2500\n   256\u2192  { type: 'shelf_wall',    tx: 2,  ty: 10 },  // wall shelf above espresso machine\n   257\u2192  { type: 'wall_art_1',    tx: 3,  ty: 10 },  // menu board / chalkboard (between shelves)\n   258\u2192  { type: 'shelf_wall',    tx: 4,  ty: 10 },  // wall shelf above coffee maker\n   259\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',   tx: 1,  ty: 10 },  // corner plant on back wall\n   260\u2192  { type: 'lamp_table',    tx: 6,  ty: 10 },  // lamp on back wall shelf\n   261\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',   tx: 1,  ty: 12 },  // staff-area corner plant\n   262\u2192  { type: 'stool',         tx: 2,  ty: 14 },  // bar stool at counter\n   263\u2192  { type: 'stool',         tx: 4,  ty: 14 },  // bar stool at counter\n   264\u2192  { type: 'stool',         tx: 6,  ty: 14 },  // bar stool at counter\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Window Seat Row (cols 10-13, rows 11-12, facing right-wall windows) \u2500\u2500\n   267\u2192  { type: 'stool',         tx: 10, ty: 11 },  // window stool 1\n   268\u2192  { type: 'stool',         tx: 12, ty: 11 },  // window stool 2\n   269\u2192  { type: 'stool',         tx: 13, ty: 11 },  // window stool 3\n   270\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',   tx: 8,  ty: 11 },  // plant at seating zone entry\n   271\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',   tx: 11, ty: 12 },  // plant below window stools\n   272\u2192  { type: 'plant_small',   tx: 14, ty: 12 },  // plant by right wall\n   273\u2192\n   274\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Table Cluster 1 \u2014 Left Center (cols 2-5, rows 15-17) \u2500\u2500\n   275\u2192  { type: 'table_large',   tx: 3,  ty: 16, tw: 2, th: 2 },  // large table (2 wide: cols 3-4)\n   276\u2192  { type: 'chair_back',    tx: 3,  ty: 15 },  // north seat 1\n   277\u2192  { type: 'chair_back',    tx: 4,  ty: 15 },  // north seat 2\n   278\u2192  { type: 'chair_front',   tx: 3,  ty: 17 },  // south seat 1\n   279\u2192  { type: 'chair_front',   tx: 4,  ty: 17 },  // south seat 2\n   280\u2192  { type: 'chair_left',    tx: 2,  ty: 16 },  // west seat\n   281\u2192  { type: 'chair_right',   tx: 5,  ty: 16 },  // east seat\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Table Cluster 2 \u2014 Right Center (cols 9-11, rows 14-16) \u2500\u2500\n   284\u2192  { type: 'table_large',   tx: 9,  ty: 15, tw: 2, th: 2 },  // large table (2 wide: cols 9-10; Sol's book sits here)\n   285\u2192  { type: 'chair_back',    tx: 9,  ty: 14 },  // north seat 1\n   286\u2192  { type: 'chair_back',    tx: 10, ty: 14 },  // north seat 2\n   287\u2192  { type: 'chair_front',   tx: 9,  ty: 16 },  // south seat 1\n   288\u2192  { type: 'chair_front',   tx: 10, ty: 16 },  // south seat 2\n   289\u2192  { type: 'lamp_table',    tx: 11, ty: 15 },  // table lamp beside cluster\n   290\u2192\n   291\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Table Cluster 3 \u2014 Lower Center (cols 6-8, rows 17-19) \u2500\u2500\n   292\u2192  { type: 'table_small',   tx: 7,  ty: 18 },  // small table\n   293\u2192  { type: 'chair_back',    tx: 7,  ty: 17 },  // north seat\n   294\u2192  { type: 'chair_front', door (right)\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Detail Props \u2014 tabletop items \u2500\u2500\n   327\u2192\n   328\u2192  // Nyx's apartment\n   329\u2192  { type: 'book_closed',   tx: 4,  ty: 4  },  // journal on Nyx's desk\n   330\u2192\n   331\u2192  // Caf\u00e9 counter surface\n   332\u2192  { type: 'cup_empty',     tx: 3,  ty: 13 },  // empty cup on counter\n   333\u2192  { type: 'pastry',        tx: 5,  ty: 13 },  // pastry on counter\n   334\u2192\n   335\u2192  // Sol's window seat (top-right seating zone)\n   336\u2192  { type: 'book_open',     tx: 12, ty: 11 },  // Sol's open book on window seat\n   337\u2192\n   338\u2192  // Caf\u00e9 tables\n   339\u2192  { type: 'cup_full',      tx: 3,  ty: 16 },  // coffee cup on Table 1\n   340\u2192  { type: 'cup_full',      tx: 12, ty: 17 },  // coffee cup on Table 4\n   341\u2192  { type: 'plate_food',    tx: 7,  ty: 18 },  // plate of food on Table 3\n   342\u2192];\n   343\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

     4→  <meta charset="utf-8">
     5→  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
     6→  <title>AI Aquarium</title>
     7→  <style>
     8→    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
     9→    body {
    10→      background: #0a0a14;
    11→      overflow: hidden;
    12→      display: flex;
    13→      justify-content: center;
    14→      align-items: center;

    16→      height: 100vh;
    17→    }

    19→    #canvas-container {
    20→      position: relative;
    21→    }
    22→
    23→    /* Debug overlay */
    24→    #debug-overlay {
    25→      position: fixed;
    26→      top: 0;
    27→      left: 0;
    28→      right: 0;
    29→      background: rgba(10, 10, 20, 0.92);

    42→      font-size: 12px;
    43→      color: #FFD700;

    49→      gap: 6px;

    52→      flex-wrap: wrap;
    53→    }
    54→    .debug-controls button {
    55→      background: #2a2a4a;
    56→      color: #e0ddd4;

    66→
    67→    .debug-status {
    68→      display: flex;
    69→      gap: 16px;
    70→      margin-bottom: 6px;
    71→      color: #aaa;
    72→      font-size: 10px;
    73→    }
    74→    .debug-status .running { color: #7c7; }

    77→
    78→    .debug-log {
    79→      max-height: 100px;
    80→      overflow-y: auto;
    81→      border-top: 1px solid #333;
    82→      padding-top: 4px;
    83→      margin-top: 4px;
    84→    }
    85→    .debug-log .entry { padding: 1px 0; }
    86→    .debug-log .obj-name { color: #8ac; }
    87→    .debug-log .from { color: #c88; }
    88→    .debug-log .to { color: #8c8; }
    89→    .debug-log .trigger { color: #cc8; }
    90→
    91→    .debug-chars {
    92→      border-top: 1px solid #333;
    93→      padding-top: 4px;
    94→      margin-top: 4px;
    95→    }
    96→    .debug-chars .char-label { color: #c8a; }
    97→    .debug-chars .char-action { color: #8ac; }
    98→    .debug-chars .char-target { color: #888; }
    99→
   100→    .debug-api {
   101→      margin-top: 4px;
   102→      padding-top: 4px;
   103→      border-top: 1px solid #333;
   104→      display: flex;
   105→      align-items: center;
   106→      gap: 6px;
   107→      flex-wrap: wrap;
   108→    }
   109→    .debug-api input {
   110→      background: #1a1a2e;
   111→      color: #e0ddd4;
   112→      border: 1px solid #444;
   113→      padding: 2px 6px;
   114→      border-radius: 3px;
   115→      font-family: inherit;
   116→      font-size: 10px;
   117→      width: 200px;
   118→    }
   119→    .debug-api input:focus { border-color: #6a8a5a; outline: none; }
   120→    .debug-api .api-warn { color: #c77; font-size: 10px; }
   121→
   122→    /* Click tooltip */
   123→    #click-tooltip {
   124→      position: fixed;
   125→      background: rgba(20, 20, 40, 0.95);
   126→      color: #e0ddd4;
   127→      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
   128→      font-size: 11px;
   129→      padding: 6px 10px;
   130→      border-radius: 4px;
   131→      border: 1px solid #555;
   132→      pointer-events: none;
   133→      z-index: 20;
   134→      display: none;
   135→    }
   136→
   137→    /* Hint text */
   138→    #hint {
   139→      position: fixed;
   140→      bottom: 8px;
   141→      right: 12px;
   142→      color: #444;
   143→      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
   144→      font-size: 10px;
   145→      z-index: 5;
   146→    }
   147→
   148→    /* Click-to-start overlay */
   149→    #start-overlay {
   150→      position: fixed;
   151→      inset: 0;
   152→      background: rgba(6, 6, 16, 0.92);
   153→      display: flex;
   154→      flex-direction: column;
   155→      justify-content: center;
   156→      align-items: center;
   157→      z-index: 100;
   158→      cursor: pointer;
   159→      user-select: none;
   160→    }
   161→    #start-overlay .title {
   162→      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
   163→      font-size: 36px;
   164→      color: #e0ddd4;
   165→      letter-spacing: 4px;
   166→      text-transform: uppercase;
   167→      margin-bottom: 24px;
   168→      text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(100, 140, 200, 0.3);
   169→    }
   170→    #start-overlay .subtitle {
   171→      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
   172→      font-size: 14px;
   173→      color: #8888aa;
   174→      animation: pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
   175→    }
   176→    @keyframes pulse {
   177→      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; }
   178→      50% { opacity: 1; }
   179→    }
   180→    #start-overlay.hidden {
   181→      display: none;
   182→    }
   183→
   184→    /* Mute toggle button */
   185→    #mute-btn {
   186→      position: fixed;
   187→      top: 10px;
   188→      right: 10px;
   189→      z-index: 50;
   190→      background: rgba(20, 20, 40, 0.7);
   191→      border: 1px solid #444;
   192→      border-radius: 4px;
   193→      color: #e0ddd4;
   194→      font-size: 18px;
   195→      width: 32px;
   196→      height: 32px;
   197→      cursor: pointer;
   198→      display: none;
   199→      align-items: center;
   200→      justify-content: center;
   201→      line-height: 1;
   202→      padding: 0;
   203→    }
   204→    #mute-btn:hover { background: rgba(40, 40, 70, 0.8); }
   205→    #mute-btn.visible { display: flex; }
   206→  </style>
   207→</head>
   208→<body>
   209→
   210→<div id="start-overlay">
   211→  <div class="title">AI Aquarium</div>
   212→  <div class="subtitle">Click anywhere to start</div>
   213→</div>
   214→
   215→<button id="mute-btn" aria-label="Toggle audio">🔊</button>
   216→
   217→<div id="canvas-container"></div>
   218→
   219→<div id="debug-overlay">
   220→  <h2>AI Aquarium Debug <span id="debugToggleHint" style="color:#666; font-weight:normal">[D to toggle]</span></h2>
   221→  <div class="debug-controls">
   222→    <button id="startBtn">Start</button>
   223→    <button id="pauseBtn">Pause</button>
   224→    <button id="stopBtn">Stop</button>
   225→    <button id="tickBtn">+1 Tick</button>
   226→    <button id="tick10Btn">+10</button>
   227→    <span style="color:#666">|</span>
   228→    <button id="speed1Btn" class="active">1x</button>
   229→    <button id="speed5Btn">5x</button>
   230→    <button id="speed20Btn">20x</button>
   231→    <span style="color:#666">|</span>
   232→    <button id="aiToggleBtn">AI: Off</button>
   233→    <span style="color:#666">|</span>
   234→    <button id="resetBtn">Reset</button>
   235→  </div>
   236→  <div class="debug-api">
   237→    <label style="color:#888; font-size:10px">API:</label>
   238→    <input id="apiEndpoint" type="text" placeholder="http://localhost:8787">
   239→    <span id="apiWarning" class="api-warn">&#9888; No endpoint set</span>
   240→  </div>
   241→  <div class="debug-status" id="debugStatus">
   242→    <span>State: <span id="engineState" class="stopped">stopped</span></span>
   243→    <span>Tick: <span id="tickCount">0</span></span>
   244→    <span>Elapsed: <span id="elapsedTime">0s</span></span>
   245→    <span>Speed: <span id="timeScale">1x</span></span>
   246→    <span>Clock: <span id="simClockDisplay">Day 1 8:00 AM</span></span>
   247→    <span>AI: <span id="aiModeDisplay" style="color:#c77">off</span></span>
   248→  </div>
   249→  <div class="debug-chars" id="charStatus"></div>
   250→  <div class="debug-log" id="debugLog"></div>
   251→</div>
   252→
   253→<div id="click-tooltip"></div>
   254→<div id="hint">Press D for debug</div>
   255→
   256→<script type="module">
   257→import { SimulationEngine } from './src/engine.js';
   258→import { Renderer, preloadSprites } from './src/renderer.js';
   259→import { TILE_SIZE } from './src/tilemap.js';
   260→import { WORLD_TREE } from './src/world.js';
   261→import { AIDecisionEngine } from './src/ai.js';
   262→import { AudioEngine } from './src/audio.js';
   263→
   264→// ── AI setup ──
   265→const aiEngine = new AIDecisionEngine();
   266→
   267→// ── Audio setup ──
   268→const audio = new AudioEngine();
   269→// Restore mute preference
   270→const savedMute = localStorage.getItem('ai-aquarium-muted');
   271→if (savedMute === 'true') {
   272→  audio.muted = true;
   273→}
   274→
   275→// ── State ──
   276→let engine = new SimulationEngine({ aiEngine });
   277→let debugVisible = false;
   278→const eventLog = [];
   279→const MAX_LOG = 30;
   280→
   281→// ── Renderer setup ──
   282→const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
   283→const renderer = new Renderer(container);
   284→
   285→// ── DOM refs ──
   286→const $ = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
   287→const debugOverlay = $('debug-overlay');
   288→const tooltip = $('click-tooltip');
   289→
   290→// ── Debug toggle ──
   291→document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
   292→  if (e.key === 'd' || e.key === 'D') {
   293→    debugVisible = !debugVisible;
   294→    debugOverlay.classList.toggle('visible', debugVisible);
   295→  }
   296→});
   297→
   298→// ── Engine event listeners ──
   299→function attachEngineListeners() {
   300→  engine.on('object:transition', (event) => {
   301→    eventLog.unshift(event);
   302→    if (eventLog.length > MAX_LOG) eventLog.pop();
   303→    renderDebugLog();
   304→
   305→    // Trigger emoji float on the renderer
   306→    if (event.emoji) {
   307→      const obj = engine.getObject(event.objectId);
   308→      if (obj) {
   309→        renderer.addEmojiFloat(obj.position.tx, obj.position.ty, event.emoji);
   310→      }
   311→    }
   312→  });
   313→
   314→  engine.on('character:interact', (event) => {
   315→    eventLog.unshift({
   316→      objectName: event.objectName,
   317→      from: event.from,
   318→      to: event.to,
   319→      trigger: event.characterName,
   320→      emoji: event.emoji || null,
   321→    });
   322→    if (eventLog.length > MAX_LOG) eventLog.pop();
   323→    renderDebugLog();
   324→
   325→    // Emoji float on character for production events
   326→    if (event.produces) {
   327→      const char = engine.getCharacters().find(c => c.id === event.characterId);
   328→      if (char) {
   329→        const emoji = event.produces === 'bread' ? '🍞' :
   330→                      event.produces === 'burnt_bread' ? '💨' : '✨';
   331→        renderer.addEmojiFloat(Math.round(char.tx), Math.round(char.ty), emoji);
   332→      }
   333→    }
   334→  });
   335→
   336→  engine.on('engine:tick', () => {
   337→    // Update status bar with sim clock + last event
   338→    const clock = engine.simClock;
   339→    const status = engine.lastStatusText || '';
   340→    const line = status
   341→      ? `${clock.dayTimeString} \u2014 ${status}`
   342→      : clock.dayTimeString;
   343→    renderer.setStatus(line);
   344→
   345→    // Sync audio ambient layers with time of day
   346→    audio.setTimeOfDay(clock.minuteOfDay);
   347→
   348→    renderDebugStatus();
   349→  });
   350→
   351→  engine.on('ai:speech', (event) => {
   352→    const char = engine.getCharacters().find(c => c.id === event.characterId);
   353→    if (char) {
   354→      renderer.addCharacterSpeech(char, event.dialogue, 5000);
   355→    }
   356→  });
   357→
   358→  engine.on('ai:status', (event) => {
   359→    engine.lastStatusText = `${event.characterName} ${event.description}`;
   360→  });
   361→}
   362→attachEngineListeners();
   363→
   364→// ── Debug controls ──
   365→$('startBtn').onclick = () => { engine.start(); renderDebugStatus(); };
   366→$('pauseBtn').onclick = () => {
   367→  if (engine.paused) engine.resume(); else engine.pause();
   368→  renderDebugStatus();
   369→};
   370→$('stopBtn').onclick = () => { engine.stop(); renderDebugStatus(); };
   371→$('tickBtn').onclick = () => { engine.manualTick(1); renderDebugStatus(); };
   372→$('tick10Btn').onclick = () => { engine.manualTick(10); renderDebugStatus(); };
   373→
   374→function setSpeed(scale) {
   375→  engine.timeScale = scale;
   376→  $('speed1Btn').classList.toggle('active', scale === 1);
   377→  $('speed5Btn').classList.toggle('active', scale === 5);
   378→  $('speed20Btn').classList.toggle('active', scale === 20);
   379→  renderDebugStatus();
   380→}
   381→$('speed1Btn').onclick = () => setSpeed(1);
   382→$('speed5Btn').onclick = () => setSpeed(5);
   383→$('speed20Btn').onclick = () => setSpeed(20);
   384→
   385→// ── AI controls ──
   386→const apiInput = $('apiEndpoint');
   387→const apiWarning = $('apiWarning');
   388→
   389→apiInput.addEventListener('change', () => {
   390→  const url = apiInput.value.trim();
   391→  aiEngine.setEndpoint(url);
   392→  apiWarning.style.display = url ? 'none' : 'inline';
   393→  if (engine.aiMode && !url) {
   394→    apiWarning.textContent = '\u26A0 AI on but no endpoint \u2014 will wander randomly';
   395→    apiWarning.style.display = 'inline';
   396→  }
   397→});
   398→
   399→$('aiToggleBtn').onclick = () => {
   400→  engine.aiMode = !engine.aiMode;
   401→  const btn = $('aiToggleBtn');
   402→  btn.textContent = `AI: ${engine.aiMode ? 'On' : 'Off'}`;
   403→  btn.classList.toggle('active', engine.aiMode);
   404→
   405→  const url = apiInput.value.trim();
   406→  if (engine.aiMode && !url) {
   407→    apiWarning.textContent = '\u26A0 AI on but no endpoint \u2014 will wander randomly';
   408→    apiWarning.style.display = 'inline';
   409→  } else if (url) {
   410→    apiWarning.style.display = 'none';
   411→  }
   412→  renderDebugStatus();
   413→};
   414→
   415→$('resetBtn').onclick = () => {
   416→  engine.stop();
   417→  engine = new SimulationEngine({ aiEngine });
   418→  // Preserve AI mode state across reset
   419→  const aiOn = $('aiToggleBtn').textContent.includes('On');
   420→  engine.aiMode = aiOn;
   421→  eventLog.length = 0;
   422→  attachEngineListeners();
   423→  renderDebugStatus();
   424→  renderDebugLog();
   425→  renderer.setStatus('');
   426→};
   427→
   428→// ── Debug status render ──
   429→function renderDebugStatus() {
   430→  const stateEl = $('engineState');
   431→  if (engine.running && !engine.paused) {
   432→    stateEl.textContent = 'running';
   433→    stateEl.className = 'running';
   434→  } else if (engine.paused) {
   435→    stateEl.textContent = 'paused';
   436→    stateEl.className = 'paused';
   437→  } else {
   438→    stateEl.textContent = 'stopped';
   439→    stateEl.className = 'stopped';
   440→  }
   441→  $('tickCount').textContent = engine.tickCount;
   442→  $('elapsedTime').textContent = formatMs(engine.elapsedMs);
   443→  $('timeScale').textContent = engine.timeScale + 'x';
   444→
   445→  $('simClockDisplay').textContent = engine.simClock.dayTimeString;
   446→  const aiDisplay = $('aiModeDisplay');
   447→  aiDisplay.textContent = engine.aiMode ? 'on' : 'off';
   448→  aiDisplay.style.color = engine.aiMode ? '#7c7' : '#c77';
   449→
   450→  renderCharStatus();
   451→}
   452→
   453→function renderDebugLog() {
   454→  const el = $('debugLog');
   455→  if (eventLog.length === 0) {
   456→    el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:#555">No events yet</div>';
   457→    return;
   458→  }
   459→  let html = '';
   460→  for (const e of eventLog) {
   461→    const emoji = e.emoji || '';
   462→    html += `<div class="entry">${emoji} <span class="obj-name">${e.objectName}</span>: <span class="from">${e.from}</span> → <span class="to">${e.to}</span> <span class="trigger">[${e.trigger}]</span></div>`;
   463→  }
   464→  el.innerHTML = html;
   465→}
   466→
   467→function renderCharStatus() {
   468→  const chars = engine.getCharacters();
   469→  let html = '<div style="color:#cc8; font-size:10px; margin-bottom:2px">Characters:</div>';
   470→  for (const c of chars) {
   471→    const target = c.targetObjectId ? ` <span class="char-target">→ ${c.targetObjectId}</span>` : '';
   472→    const moodIcon = c.moodEmoji || '';
   473→    const lastObj = c.lastObjectId ? ` <span style="color:#555">last:${c.lastObjectId}</span>` : '';
   474→    html += `<div style="padding:1px 0"><span class="char-label">${c.name}</span> ${moodIcon}: ` +
   475→      `<span class="char-action">${c.action}</span> ` +
   476→      `<span style="color:#686">[${c.mood}]</span> ` +
   477→      `(${Math.round(c.tx)},${Math.round(c.ty)})${target}${lastObj}</div>`;
   478→  }
   479→  $('charStatus').innerHTML = html;
   480→}
   481→
   482→// ── Canvas click → find object at tile → trigger interaction ──
   483→renderer.canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   484→  const { tx, ty } = renderer.pageToTile(e.clientX, e.clientY);
   485→  const obj = findObjectAtTile(tx, ty);
   486→
   487→  if (obj) {
   488→    const stateDef = obj.currentStateDef;
   489→    if (stateDef?.transitions) {
   490→      // Pick first available action
   491→      const action = Object.keys(stateDef.transitions)[0];
   492→      if (action) {
   493→        engine.interact(obj.id, action);
   494→        renderDebugStatus();
   495→
   496→        // Show brief feedback
   497→        showTooltip(e.clientX, e.clientY, `${obj.name}: ${action}`);
   498→      }
   499→    } else {
   500→      showTooltip(e.clientX, e.clientY, `${obj.name} [${obj.state}] — no actions`);
   501→    }
   502→  }
   503→});
   504→
   505→// Right-click: show all available actions for multi-action objects
   506→renderer.canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
   507→  e.preventDefault();
   508→  const { tx, ty } = renderer.pageToTile(e.clientX, e.clientY);
   509→  const obj = findObjectAtTile(tx, ty);
   510→
   511→  if (obj) {
   512→    const stateDef = obj.currentStateDef;
   513→    const actions = stateDef?.transitions ? Object.keys(stateDef.transitions) : [];
   514→    const timerInfo = obj.timeRemainingMs !== null
   515→      ? ` (${(obj.timeRemainingMs / 1000).toFixed(0)}s remaining)`
   516→      : '';
   517→    showTooltip(e.clientX, e.clientY,
   518→      `${obj.name} [${obj.state}]${timerInfo}
Actions: ${actions.length ? actions.join(', ') : 'none'}`,
   519→      2000
   520→    );
   521→  }
   522→});
   523→
   524→function findObjectAtTile(tx, ty) {
   525→  const objects = engine.getAllObjects();
   526→  for (const obj of objects) {
   527→    const otx = obj.position.tx;
   528→    const oty = obj.position.ty;
   529→    const otw = obj.position.tw || 1;
   530→    const oth = obj.position.th || 1;
   531→    if (tx >= otx && tx < otx + otw && ty >= oty && ty < oty + oth) {
   532→      return obj;
   533→    }
   534→  }
   535→  return null;
   536→}
   537→
   538→function showTooltip(x, y, text, duration = 1200) {
   539→  tooltip.style.left = (x + 12) + 'px';
   540→  tooltip.style.top = (y - 20) + 'px';
   541→  tooltip.textContent = text;
   542→  tooltip.style.display = 'block';
   543→  clearTimeout(tooltip._hideTimer);
   544→  tooltip._hideTimer = setTimeout(() => {
   545→    tooltip.style.display = 'none';
   546→  }, duration);
   547→}
   548→
   549→// ── Utilities ──
   550→function formatMs(ms) {
   551→  const totalSec = Math.floor(ms / 1000);
   552→  const min = Math.floor(totalSec / 60);
   553→  const sec = totalSec % 60;
   554→  return min > 0 ? `${min}m ${sec}s` : `${sec}s`;
   555→}
   556→
   557→// ── Preload sprites, then start render loop ──
   558→preloadSprites().then(sprites => {
   559→  renderer.setSprites(sprites);
   560→  console.log(`Sprites loaded: ${sprites.tiles.size} tiles, ${sprites.objects.size} objects, ${sprites.characters.size} characters`);
   561→}).catch(err => {
   562→  console.warn('Sprite preload failed, using color fallback:', err);
   563→}).finally(() => {
   564→  renderer.startLoop(
   565→    () => engine.getAllObjects(),
   566→    () => engine.getCharacters(),
   567→    { showDebug: () => debugVisible, getSimClock: () => engine.simClock }
   568→  );
   569→});
   570→
   571→// ── Click-to-start overlay ──
   572→const overlay = $('start-overlay');
   573→const muteBtn = $('mute-btn');
   574→
   575→overlay.addEventListener('click', () => {
   576→  overlay.classList.add('hidden');
   577→  muteBtn.textContent = audio.muted ? '🔇' : '🔊';
   578→  muteBtn.classList.add('visible');
   579→  engine.start();
   580→  audio.start();
   581→  renderDebugStatus();
   582→  console.log('AI Aquarium started');
   583→});
   584→
   585→// ── Mute toggle ──
   586→muteBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   587→  const muted = audio.toggleMute();
   588→  muteBtn.textContent = muted ? '🔇' : '🔊';
   589→  localStorage.setItem('ai-aquarium-muted', muted);
   590→});
   591→
   592→// ── Initial state ──
   593→renderDebugStatus();
   594→renderDebugLog();
   595→
   596→console.log('AI Aquarium — Click to start');
   597→console.log('Objects:', engine.getAllObjects().map(o => `${o.id} [${o.state}]`).join(', '));
   598→console.log('Characters:', engine.getCharacters().map(c => `${c.name} at (${c.tx},${c.ty})`).join(', '));
   599→</script>
   600→</body>
   601→</html>
   602→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

  color: #aaa;\n    72\u2192      font-size: 10px;\n    73\u2192    }\n    74\u2192    .debug-status .running { color: #7c7; }\n    75\u2192    .debug-status .paused { color: #cc7; }\n    76\u2192    .debug-status .stopped { color: #c77; }\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192    .debug-log {\n    79\u2192      max-height: 100px;\n    80\u2192      overflow-y: auto;\n    81\u2192      border-top: 1px solid #333;\n    82\u2192      padding-top: 4px;\n    83\u2192      margin-top: 4px;\n    84\u2192    }\n    85\u2192    .debug-log .entry { padding: 1px 0; }\n    86\u2192    .debug-log .obj-name { color: #8ac; }\n    87\u2192    .debug-log .from { color: #c88; }\n    88\u2192    .debug-log .to { color: #8c8; }\n    89\u2192    .debug-log .trigger { color: #cc8; }\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192 color: #c8a; }\n    97\u2192    .debug-chars .char-action { color: #8ac; }\n    98\u2192    .debug-chars .char-target { color: #888; }\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192    .debug-api {\n   101\u2192 6px;\n   107\u2192      flex-wrap: wrap;\n   108\u2192    }\n   109\u2192    .debug-api input {\n   110\u2192      background: #1a1a2e;\n   111\u2192      color: #e0ddd4;\n   112\u2192      border: 200px;\n   118\u2192    }\n   119\u2192    .debug-api input:focus { border-color: #6a8a5a; outline: none; }\n   120\u2192    .debug-api .api-warn { color: #c77; font-size: 10px; }\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192    /* Click tooltip */\n   123\u2192    #click-tooltip {\n   124\u2192      position: fixed;\n   125\u2192      background: rgba(20, 20, 40, 0.95);\n   126\u2192      color: #e0ddd4;\n   127\u2192      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;\n   128\u2192      font-size: 11px;\n   129\u2192      padding: 6px 10px;\n   130\u2192      border-radius: 4px;\n   131\u2192      border: 1px solid #555;\n   132\u2192      pointer-events: none;\n   133\u2192      z-index: 20;\n   134\u2192      display: none;\n   135\u2192    }\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192    /* Hint text */\n   138\u2192    #hint {\n   139\u2192      position: fixed;\n   140\u2192      bottom: 8px;\n   141\u2192      right: 12px;\n   142\u2192      color: #444;\n   143\u2192      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;\n   144\u2192      font-size: 10px;\n   145\u2192      z-index: 5;\n   146\u2192    }\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192    /* Click-to-start overlay */\n   149\u2192    #start-overlay {\n   150\u2192      position: fixed;\n   151\u2192      inset: 0;\n   152\u2192      background: rgba(6, 6, 16, 0.92);\n   153\u2192      display: flex;\n   154\u2192      flex-direction: column;\n   155\u2192      justify-content: center;\n   156\u2192      align-items: center;\n   157\u2192      z-index: 100;\n   158\u2192      cursor: pointer;\n   159\u2192      user-select: none;\n   160\u2192    }\n   161\u2192    #start-overlay .title {\n   162\u2192      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;\n   163\u2192      font-size: 36px;\n   164\u2192      color: #e0ddd4;\n   165\u2192      letter-spacing: 4px;\n   166\u2192      text-transform: uppercase;\n   167\u2192      margin-bottom: 24px;\n   168\u2192      text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(100, 140, 200, 0.3);\n   169\u2192    }\n   170\u2192    #start-overlay .subtitle {\n   171\u2192      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;\n   172\u2192      font-size: 14px;\n   173\u2192      color: #8888aa;\n   174\u2192      animation: pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n   175\u2192    }\n   176\u2192    @keyframes pulse {\n   177\u2192      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; }\n   178\u2192      50% { opacity: 1; }\n   179\u2192    }\n   180\u2192    #start-overlay.hidden {\n   181\u2192      display: none;\n   182\u2192    }\n   183\u2192\n   184\u2192    /* Mute toggle button */\n   185\u2192    #mute-btn {\n   186\u2192      position: fixed;\n   187\u2192      top: 10px;\n   188\u2192      right: 10px;\n   189\u2192      z-index: 50;\n   190\u2192      background: rgba(20, 20, 40, 0.7);\n   191\u2192      border: 1px solid #444;\n   192\u2192      border-radius: 4px;\n   193\u2192      color: #e0ddd4;\n   194\u2192      font-size: 18px;\n   195\u2192      width: 32px;\n   196\u2192      height: 32px;\n   197\u2192      cursor: pointer;\n   198\u2192      display: none;\n   199\u2192      align-items: center;\n   200\u2192      justify-content: center;\n   201\u2192      line-height: 1;\n   202\u2192      padding: 0;\n   203\u2192    }\n   204\u2192    #mute-btn:hover { background: rgba(40, 40, 70, 0.8); }\n   205\u2192    #mute-btn.visible { display: flex; }\n   206\u2192  </style>\n   207\u2192</head>\n   208\u2192<body>\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192<div id=\"start-overlay\">\n   211\u2192  <div class=\"title\">AI Aquarium</div>\n   212\u2192  <div class=\"subtitle\">Click anywhere to start</div>\n   213\u2192</div>\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192<button id=\"mute-btn\" aria-label=\"Toggle audio\">\ud83d\udd0a</button>\n   216\u2192\n   217\u2192<div id=\"canvas-container\"></div>\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192<div id=\"debug-overlay\">\n   220\u2192  <h2>AI Aquarium Debug <span id=\"debugToggleHint\" style=\"color:#666; font-weight:normal\">[D to toggle]</span></h2>\n   221\u2192  <div class=\"debug-controls\">\n   222\u2192    <button id=\"startBtn\">Start</button>\n   223\u2192    <button id=\"pauseBtn\">Pause</button>\n   224\u2192    <button id=\"stopBtn\">Stop</button>\n   225\u2192    <button id=\"tickBtn\">+1 Tick</button>\n   226\u2192    <button id=\"tick10Btn\">+10</button>\n   227\u2192    <span style=\"color:#666\">|</span>\n   228\u2192    <button id=\"speed1Btn\" class=\"active\">1x</button>\n   229\u2192    <button id=\"speed5Btn\">5x</button>\n   230\u2192    <button id=\"speed20Btn\">20x</button>\n   231\u2192    <span style=\"color:#666\">|</span>\n   232\u2192    <button id=\"aiToggleBtn\">AI: Off</button>\n   233\u2192    <span style=\"color:#666\">|</span>\n   234\u2192    <button id=\"resetBtn\">Reset</button>\n   235\u2192  </div>\n   236\u2192  <div class=\"debug-api\">\n   237\u2192    <label style=\"color:#888; font-size:10px\">API:</label>\n   238\u2192    <input id=\"apiEndpoint\" type=\"text\" placeholder=\"http://localhost:8787\">\n   239\u2192    <span id=\"apiWarning\" class=\"api-warn\">&#9888; No endpoint set</span>\n   240\u2192  </div>\n   241\u2192 276\u2192let engine = new SimulationEngine({ aiEngine });\n   277\u2192let debugVisible = false;\n   278\u2192const eventLog = [];\n   279\u2192const MAX_LOG = 30;\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192// 285\u2192// \u2500\u2500 DOM refs \u2500\u2500\n   286\u2192const $ = (id) => document.getElementById(id);\n   287\u2192const debugOverlay = $('debug-overlay');\n   288\u2192const tooltip = 307\u2192      const obj = engine.getObject(event.objectId);\n   308\u2192      if (obj) {\n   309\u2192        renderer.addEmojiFloat(obj.position.tx, obj.position.ty, event.emoji);\n   310\u2192      }\n   311\u2192    }\n   312\u2192  });\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192  engine.on('character:interact', (event) => {\n   315\u2192    eventLog.unshift({\n   316\u2192      objectName: 'bread' ? '\ud83c\udf5e' :\n   330\u2192                      event.produces === 'burnt_bread' ? '\ud83d\udca8' : '\u2728';\n   331\u2192        renderer.addEmojiFloat(Math.round(char.tx), Math.round(char.ty), emoji);\n   332\u2192      }\n   333\u2192    }\n   334\u2192  });\n   335\u2192\n   336\u2192  engine.on('engine:tick', () => {\n   337\u2192    // Update status bar with sim clock + last event\n   338\u2192    const clock = engine.simClock;\n   339\u2192    const status = engine.lastStatusText || '';\n   340\u2192    const line = status\n   341\u2192      ? `${clock.dayTimeString} \\u2014 ${status}`\n   342\u2192      : clock.dayTimeString;\n   343\u2192    renderer.setStatus(line);\n   344\u2192\n   345\u2192    // Sync audio ambient layers with time of day\n   346\u2192    audio.setTimeOfDay(clock.minuteOfDay);\n   347\u2192\n   348\u2192    renderDebugStatus();\n   349\u2192  });\n   350\u2192\n   351\u2192  engine.on('ai:speech', (event) => {\n   352\u2192    const char = engine.getCharacters().find(c => c.id === event.characterId);\n   353\u2192    if (char) {\n   354\u2192      renderer.addCharacterSpeech(char, event.dialogue, 5000);\n   355\u2192    }\n   356\u2192  });\n   357\u2192\n   358\u2192  engine.on('ai:status', (event) => {\n   359\u2192    engine.lastStatusText = `${event.characterName} ${event.description}`;\n   360\u2192  });\n   361\u2192}\n   362\u2192attachEngineListeners();\n   363\u2192\n   364\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Debug controls \u2500\u2500\n   365\u2192$('startBtn').onclick = () => { engine.start(); renderDebugStatus(); };\n   366\u2192$('pauseBtn').onclick = () => {\n   367\u2192  if (engine.paused) engine.resume(); else engine.pause();\n   368\u2192  renderDebugStatus();\n   369\u2192};\n   370\u2192$('stopBtn').onclick = () => { engine.stop(); renderDebugStatus(); };\n   371\u2192$('tickBtn').onclick = () => { engine.manualTick(1); renderDebugStatus(); };\n   372\u2192$('tick10Btn').onclick = () => { engine.manualTick(10); renderDebugStatus(); };\n   373\u2192\n   374\u2192function setSpeed(scale) {\n   375\u2192  engine.timeScale = scale;\n   376\u2192  $('speed1Btn').classList.toggle('active', scale === 1);\n   377\u2192  $('speed5Btn').classList.toggle('active', scale === 5);\n   378\u2192  $('speed20Btn').classList.toggle('active', scale === 20);\n   379\u2192  renderDebugStatus();\n   380\u2192}\n   381\u2192$('speed1Btn').onclick = () => setSpeed(1);\n   382\u2192$('speed5Btn').onclick = () => setSpeed(5);\n   383\u2192$('speed20Btn').onclick = () => setSpeed(20);\n   384\u2192\n   385\u2192// \u2500\u2500 AI controls \u2500\u2500\n   386\u2192const apiInput = $('apiEndpoint');\n   387\u2192const apiWarning = $('apiWarning');\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192apiInput.addEventListener('change', () => {\n   390\u2192  const url = apiInput.value.trim();\n   391\u2192  aiEngine.setEndpoint(url);\n   392\u2192  apiWarning.style.display = url ? 'On' : 'Off'}`;\n   403\u2192  btn.classList.toggle('active', engine.aiMode);\n   404\u2192\n   405\u2192  const url = apiInput.value.trim();\n   406\u2192  if (engine.aiMode && !url) {\n   407\u2192    apiWarning.textContent = '\\u26A0 AI on but no endpoint \\u2014 will wander randomly';\n   408\u2192    apiWarning.style.display = 'inline';\n   409\u2192  } else if (url) {\n   410\u2192 417\u2192  engine = new SimulationEngine({ aiEngine });\n   418\u2192  // Preserve AI mode state across reset\n   419\u2192  const aiOn = $('aiToggleBtn').textContent.includes('On');\n   420\u2192  engine.aiMode = aiOn;\n   421\u2192  eventLog.length = 0;\n   422\u2192  attachEngineListeners();\n   423\u2192  renderDebugStatus();\n   424\u2192  renderDebugLog();\n   425\u2192  renderer.setStatus('');\n   426\u2192};\n   427\u2192\n   428\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Debug status render \u2500\u2500\n   429\u2192function renderDebugStatus() {\n   430\u2192  const stateEl = $('engineState');\n   431\u2192  if (engine.running && !engine.paused) {\n   432\u2192    stateEl.textContent = 'running';\n   433\u2192    stateEl.className = 'running';\n   434\u2192  } else if (engine.paused) {\n   435\u2192    stateEl.textContent = 'paused';\n   436\u2192    stateEl.className = 'paused';\n   437\u2192  } else {\n   438\u2192    stateEl.textContent = 'stopped';\n   439\u2192    stateEl.className = 'stopped';\n   440\u2192  }\n   441\u2192  $('tickCount').textContent = engine.tickCount;\n   442\u2192  $('elapsedTime').textContent = formatMs(engine.elapsedMs);\n   443\u2192  $('timeScale').textContent = engine.timeScale + 'x';\n   444\u2192\n   445\u2192  $('simClockDisplay').textContent = engine.simClock.dayTimeString;\n   446\u2192  const aiDisplay = $('aiModeDisplay');\n   447\u2192  aiDisplay.textContent = engine.aiMode ? 'on' : 'off';\n   448\u2192  aiDisplay.style.color = engine.aiMode ? '#7c7' : '#c77';\n   449\u2192\n   450\u2192  renderCharStatus();\n   451\u2192}\n   452\u2192\n   453\u2192function renderDebugLog() {\n   454\u2192  const el = $('debugLog');\n   455\u2192  if (eventLog.length === 0) {\n   456\u2192    el.innerHTML = '<div style=\"color:#555\">No events yet</div>';\n   457\u2192    return;\n   458\u2192  }\n   459\u2192  let html = '';\n   460\u2192  for (const e of eventLog) {\n   461\u2192    const emoji = e.emoji || '';\n   462\u2192    html += `<div class=\"entry\">${emoji} <span class=\"obj-name\">${e.objectName}</span>: <span class=\"from\">${e.from}</span> \u2192 <span class=\"to\">${e.to}</span> <span class=\"trigger\">[${e.trigger}]</span></div>`;\n   463\u2192  }\n   464\u2192  el.innerHTML = html;\n   465\u2192}\n   466\u2192\n   467\u2192function renderCharStatus() {\n   468\u2192  const chars = engine.getCharacters();\n   469\u2192  let html = '<div style=\"color:#cc8; font-size:10px; margin-bottom:2px\">Characters:</div>';\n   470\u2192  for (const c of chars) {\n   471\u2192    const target = c.targetObjectId ? ` <span class=\"char-target\">\u2192 ${c.targetObjectId}</span>` : '';\n   472\u2192    const moodIcon = c.moodEmoji || '';\n   473\u2192    const lastObj = c.lastObjectId ? ` <span style=\"color:#555\">last:${c.lastObjectId}</span>` : '';\n   474\u2192    html += `<div style=\"padding:1px 0\"><span class=\"char-label\">${c.name}</span> ${moodIcon}: ` +\n   475\u2192      `<span class=\"char-action\">${c.action}</span> ` +\n   476\u2192      `<span style=\"color:#686\">[${c.mood}]</span> ` +\n   477\u2192      `(${Math.round(c.tx)},${Math.round(c.ty)})${target}${lastObj}</div>`;\n   478\u2192  }\n   479\u2192  $('charStatus').innerHTML = html;\n   480\u2192}\n   481\u2192\n   482\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Canvas click \u2192 find object at tile \u2192 trigger interaction \u2500\u2500\n   483\u2192renderer.canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n   484\u2192  const { tx, ty } = renderer.pageToTile(e.clientX, e.clientY);\n   485\u2192  const obj = findObjectAtTile(tx, ty);\n   486\u2192\n   487\u2192  if (obj) {\n   488\u2192    const stateDef = obj.currentStateDef;\n   489\u2192    if (stateDef?.transitions) {\n   490\u2192      // Pick first available action\n   491\u2192      const action = Object.keys(stateDef.transitions)[0];\n   492\u2192      if (action) {\n   493\u2192        engine.interact(obj.id, action);\n   494\u2192        renderDebugStatus();\n   495\u2192\n   496\u2192        // Show brief feedback\n   497\u2192        showTooltip(e.clientX, e.clientY, `${obj.name}: ${action}`);\n   498\u2192      }\n   499\u2192    } else {\n   500\u2192      showTooltip(e.clientX, e.clientY, `${obj.name} [${obj.state}] \u2014 no actions`);\n   501\u2192    }\n   502\u2192  }\n   503\u2192});\n   504\u2192\n   505\u2192// Right-click: show all available actions for multi-action objects\n   506\u2192renderer.canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {\n   507\u2192  e.preventDefault();\n   508\u2192  const { tx, ty } = renderer.pageToTile(e.clientX, e.clientY);\n   509\u2192  const obj = findObjectAtTile(tx, ty);\n   510\u2192\n   511\u2192  if (obj) {\n   512\u2192    const stateDef = obj.currentStateDef;\n   513\u2192    const actions = stateDef?.transitions ? Object.keys(stateDef.transitions) : [];\n   514\u2192    const timerInfo = obj.timeRemainingMs !== null\n   515\u2192      ? ` (${(obj.timeRemainingMs / 1000).toFixed(0)}s remaining)`\n   516\u2192      : '';\n   517\u2192    showTooltip(e.clientX, e.clientY,\n   518\u2192      `${obj.name} [${obj.state}]${timerInfo}\\nActions: ${actions.length ? actions.join(', ') : 'none'}`,\n   519\u2192      2000\n   520\u2192    );\n   521\u2192  }\n   522\u2192});\n   523\u2192\n   524\u2192function findObjectAtTile(tx, ty) {\n   525\u2192  const objects = engine.getAllObjects();\n   526\u2192  for (const obj of objects) {\n   527\u2192    const otx = obj.position.tx;\n   528\u2192    const oty = obj.position.ty;\n   529\u2192    const otw = obj.position.tw || 1;\n   530\u2192    const oth = obj.position.th || 1;\n   531\u2192    if (tx >= otx && tx < otx + otw && ty >= oty && ty < oty + oth) {\n   532\u2192      return obj;\n   533\u2192    }\n   534\u2192  }\n   535\u2192  return null;\n   536\u2192}\n   537\u2192\n   538\u2192function showTooltip(x, y, text, duration = 1200) {\n   539\u2192  tooltip.style.left = (x + 12) + 'px';\n   540\u2192  tooltip.style.top = (y - 20) + 'px';\n   541\u2192  tooltip.textContent = text;\n   542\u2192  tooltip.style.display = 'block';\n   543\u2192  clearTimeout(tooltip._hideTimer);\n   544\u2192  tooltip._hideTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n   545\u2192    tooltip.style.display = 'none';\n   546\u2192  }, duration);\n   547\u2192}\n   548\u2192\n   549\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Utilities \u2500\u2500\n   550\u2192function formatMs(ms) {\n   551\u2192  const totalSec = Math.floor(ms / 1000);\n   552\u2192  const min = Math.floor(totalSec / 60);\n   553\u2192  const sec = totalSec % 60;\n   554\u2192  return min > 0 ? `${min}m ${sec}s` : `${sec}s`;\n   555\u2192}\n   556\u2192\n   557\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Preload sprites, then start render loop \u2500\u2500\n   558\u2192preloadSprites().then(sprites => {\n   559\u2192  renderer.setSprites(sprites);\n   560\u2192  console.log(`Sprites loaded: ${sprites.tiles.size} tiles, ${sprites.objects.size} objects, ${sprites.characters.size} characters`);\n   561\u2192}).catch(err => {\n   562\u2192  console.warn('Sprite preload failed, using color fallback:', err);\n   563\u2192}).finally(() => {\n   564\u2192  renderer.startLoop(\n   565\u2192    () => engine.getAllObjects(),\n   566\u2192    () => engine.getCharacters(),\n   567\u2192    { showDebug: () => debugVisible, getSimClock: () => engine.simClock }\n   568\u2192  );\n   569\u2192});\n   570\u2192\n   571\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Click-to-start overlay \u2500\u2500\n   572\u2192const overlay = $('start-overlay');\n   573\u2192const muteBtn = $('mute-btn');\n   574\u2192\n   575\u2192overlay.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   576\u2192  overlay.classList.add('hidden');\n   577\u2192  muteBtn.textContent = audio.muted ? '\ud83d\udd07' : '\ud83d\udd0a';\n   578\u2192  muteBtn.classList.add('visible');\n   579\u2192  engine.start();\n   580\u2192  audio.start();\n   581\u2192  renderDebugStatus();\n   582\u2192  console.log('AI Aquarium started');\n   583\u2192});\n   584\u2192\n   585\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Mute toggle \u2500\u2500\n   586\u2192muteBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   587\u2192  const muted = audio.toggleMute();\n   588\u2192  muteBtn.textContent = muted ? '\ud83d\udd07' : '\ud83d\udd0a';\n   589\u2192  localStorage.setItem('ai-aquarium-muted', muted);\n   590\u2192});\n   591\u2192\n   592\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Initial state \u2500\u2500\n   593\u2192renderDebugStatus();\n   594\u2192renderDebugLog();\n   595\u2192\n   596\u2192console.log('AI Aquarium \u2014 Click to start');\n   597\u2192console.log('Objects:', engine.getAllObjects().map(o => `${o.id} [${o.state}]`).join(', '));\n   598\u2192console.log('Characters:', engine.getCharacters().map(c => `${c.name} at (${c.tx},${c.ty})`).join(', '));\n   599\u2192</script>\n   600\u2192</body>\n   601\u2192</html>\n   602\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

USERMESSAGE #53
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
Perfect! I have all the key files. Let me now provide a comprehensive analysis of the FRG-245 character collision avoidance feature based on my thorough examination of the source code.

## FRG-245 Character Collision Avoidance Feature - Complete Analysis

### 1. Collision Avoidance Methods

**`_getOccupiedTiles(exceptChar)`** (engine.js:411-418)
```javascript
Returns: Set<number> - tile keys (ty*MAP_COLS+tx) for all characters except exceptChar
Purpose: Creates a set of blocked tiles from all other characters' positions
Returns Set of tile keys where each key = (character.ty * MAP_COLS + character.tx)
```

**`_moveCharWithCollision(char, goalTx, goalTy)`** (engine.js:421-424)
```javascript
Signature: _moveCharWithCollision(char, goalTx, goalTy)
Returns: boolean - true if path found, false if blocked
Purpose: Wrapper around char.moveTo() that passes occupied tiles as extraBlocked param
Implementation:
  const blocked = this._getOccupiedTiles(char);
  return char.moveTo(goalTx, goalTy, blocked);
```

**`_findFreeInteractTile(objPosition, char)`** (engine.js:427-452)
```javascript
Signature: _findFreeInteractTile(objPosition, char)
Returns: { tx: number, ty: number } | null - free tile adjacent to object, or null if none
Purpose: Finds walkable interaction tile preferring unoccupied tiles
Logic:
  1. Gets occupied tiles from other characters
  2. Finds all adjacent walkable tiles around object
  3. Returns preferentially from "free" (unoccupied) pool
  4. Falls back to "all" pool if no free tiles
  5. Randomly selects from pool (line 451)
```

**`_deadlockEscape(char)`** (engine.js:459-476)
```javascript
Signature: _deadlockEscape(char)
Returns: void (moves char to adjacent free tile or clears _pendingTarget if surrounded)
Purpose: Emergency exit when path is completely blocked after 3 retries
Logic:
  1. Tries 4 directions (shuffled): [0,-1], [0,1], [-1,0], [1,0]
  2. Only moves to walkable, unoccupied tiles
  3. Preserves _pendingTarget so arrival handler knows to re-path
  4. If completely surrounded, clears _pendingTarget and _retryCount
Notes: Does NOT use moveTo() - direct position change via char.moveTo(nx, ny)
```

---

### 2. Character Collision Properties

From characters.js (lines 152-155):

```javascript
// Collision retry state (managed by SimulationEngine)
this._pendingTarget = null;  // { obj, action, tile } — blocked goal awaiting retry
this._retryCount = 0;        // number of failed path attempts for current goal
this._retryTimer = 0;        // ms until next retry attempt
```

**Data Structure Details:**
- `_pendingTarget`: Object with fields: `{ obj, action, tile }`
  - `obj`: The target object being blocked
  - `action`: Interaction action to perform ('use', etc.)
  - `tile`: The free interact tile to reach { tx, ty }
- `_retryCount`: Integer (0-3) - tracks failed attempts before deadlock escape
- `_retryTimer`: Number in milliseconds - countdown until next retry attempt

---

### 3. MAP_COLS Export (tilemap.js)

**Export Statement** (tilemap.js:8):
```javascript
export const MAP_COLS = 16;
```

The map is 16 tiles wide. Used in:
- Tile key calculation: `key = ty * MAP_COLS + tx`
- Bounds checking in `isWalkable(tx, ty)` (line 18)
- Map array initialization (16 columns per row)

---

### 4. Engine Exposure Pattern (index.html)

**Current Pattern:** The engine is NOT directly exposed on `window._gameEngine`. 

**Current Setup** (index.html:256-599):
- Engine is created as local variable: `let engine = new SimulationEngine({ aiEngine });` (line 276)
- Engine is scoped to the module block (no global exposure)
- Tests/debugging access engine via local variable in the same script

**To inject window._gameEngine**, the pattern would be (line ~276 area):
```javascript
let engine = new SimulationEngine({ aiEngine });
window._gameEngine = engine;  // ← INJECTION POINT
```

The code structure shows this is designed to be testable but not yet exposed. No comment marker exists for injection point yet.

---

### 5. snapshot() Method Return Value

**Location:** engine.js:162-179

**Returns Object with these fields:**
```javascript
{
  running: boolean,
  paused: boolean,
  elapsedMs: number,
  tickCount: number,
  tickIntervalMs: number,
  timeScale: number,
  aiMode: boolean,
  simClock: { 
    day: number, 
    time: string  // e.g., "8:30 AM"
  },
  objects: [...],  // from objectEngine.snapshot()
  characters: [
    {
      id: string,           // 'maple', 'sol', 'nyx'
      name: string,
      tx: number,
      ty: number,
      action: string,       // 'idle' | 'walking' | 'interacting'
      facing: string,       // 'up' | 'down' | 'left' | 'right'
      mood: string,         // 'happy' | 'content' | 'neutral' | 'upset'
      targetObjectId: string | null,
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### 6. Injection String Comment Pattern

**Current Status:** No explicit comment marker exists in index.html for `window._gameEngine` injection.

The closest logical insertion point is **line 276** in the script block:
```javascript
// ── State ──
let engine = new SimulationEngine({ aiEngine });
// ← Could add comment here like: window._gameEngine = engine; // Expose for testing/debugging
let debugVisible = false;
```

**Suggested injection comment pattern:**
```javascript
// ── Expose engine for testing/console access ──
// window._gameEngine = engine;
```

---

### 7. Character Entities

**Character IDs:** All defined in characters.js:323-348

| ID | Name | Sector | Starting Position | Personality |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `maple` | Maple | 'cafe' | (3, 12) | Warm, chatty barista |
| `sol` | Sol | 'cafe' | (10, 16) | Quiet, bookish regular |
| `nyx` | Nyx | 'apartment' | (3, 4) | Creative night owl |

All three are instantiated at engine startup via `CHARACTER_DEFS.map(def => new Character(def))` (engine.js:36).

---

### 8. moveTo() Signature - extraBlocked Parameter

**Location:** characters.js:195-209

```javascript
moveTo(goalTx, goalTy, extraBlocked = null) {
  const path = findPath(
    Math.round(this.tx), 
    Math.round(this.ty), 
    goalTx, 
    goalTy, 
    extraBlocked  // ← Passed directly to pathfinding
  );
  // ... sets path, resets animation, returns boolean
  if (path && path.length > 0) {
    this.path = path;
    this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);
    this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);
    this.moveProgress = 0;
    this.walkFrame = 0;
    this.walkTimer = 0;
    this.action = 'walking';
    this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}
```

**Parameter `extraBlocked` Details:**
- **Type:** `Set<number> | null`
- **Default:** `null`
- **Content:** Tile keys (format: `ty * MAP_COLS + tx`) to mark as unwalkable during A* pathfinding
- **Usage in findPath()** (characters.js:30, line 77):
  ```javascript
  // Skip tiles blocked by other characters (but always allow the goal tile)
  if (extraBlocked && nKey !== goalKey && extraBlocked.has(nKey)) continue;
```
- **Key Detail:** Goal tile is ALWAYS allowed even if in extraBlocked (to avoid infinite loops if target is occupied)

---

## Summary

The FRG-245 collision avoidance system uses a **retry + deadlock escape** pattern:

1. **Initial pathing** uses `_moveCharWithCollision()` which passes occupied tiles to A*
2. **If blocked:** Store goal in `_pendingTarget` with `_retryCount=1` and `_retryTimer=500-1000ms`
3. **On retry timer expiry:** Attempt path 3 times with incrementing retry count
4. **After 3 failures:** Call `_deadlockEscape()` to move to random adjacent free tile
5. **After escape:** Arrival handler re-paths to original goal from new position
6. **Safety:** Goal tile is always pathable even if occupied (prevents deadlock)

All file paths are absolute in `/home/gem/ai-aquarium-frg-245/`.
